title: Indicating the whole with 'quan'
explanation: Indicating the whole with 'quan'. Used for sentence patterns, expressing quantity.

examples.chinese: 全公司的人都不喜欢新老板。
examples.pinyin: quán gōngsī de rén dū bù xǐhuān xīn lǎobǎn 。
examples.english: People across the company do not like the new boss.

examples.chinese: 运动完以后我全身都是汗。
examples.pinyin: yùndòng wán yǐhòu wǒ quán shēn dū shì hàn 。
examples.english: After the exercise, I was sweating all over.

examples.chinese: 全校都放假了。
examples.pinyin: quán xiào dū fàngjiǎ le 。
examples.english: The whole school is on holiday.

examples.chinese: 这个地方全年都很热。
examples.pinyin: zhègè dìfāng quán nián dū hěn rè 。
examples.english: This place is hot all year round.

examples.chinese: 大家全都到了。
examples.pinyin: dàjiā quán dū dào le 。
examples.english: Everyone is here.

title: Negative adjectives with '-si le'
explanation: Negative adjectives with '-si le'. Used for expressing degree, emphasizing.

examples.chinese: 我饿死了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ è sǐle 。
examples.english: I'm starving.

examples.chinese: 今天累死了。
examples.pinyin: jīntiān lèi sǐle 。
examples.english: I'm exhausted today.

examples.chinese: 热死了！
examples.pinyin: rè sǐle！
examples.english: it's too hot!

examples.chinese: 这几天忙死了。
examples.pinyin: zhè jī tiān máng sǐle 。
examples.english: These days I am busy dying.

examples.chinese: 这件衣服丑死了。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn yīfú chǒu sǐle 。
examples.english: This dress is ugly.

title: Approximations with 'chabuduo'
explanation: Approximations with 'chabuduo'. Used for comparing, expressing degree, expressing similarity.

examples.chinese: 这几个地方都差不多。
examples.pinyin: zhè jī gè dìfāng dū chàbùduō 。
examples.english: These places are similar.

examples.chinese: 这两个词的意思差不多。
examples.pinyin: zhè liǎng gè cí de yìsī chàbùduō 。
examples.english: These two words have the same meaning.

examples.chinese: 我们的想法差不多。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen de xiǎngfǎ chàbùduō 。
examples.english: Our thoughts are similar.

examples.chinese: 那两家餐厅的菜差不多。
examples.pinyin: nà liǎng jiā cāntīng de cài chàbùduō 。
examples.english: The dishes in those two restaurants are similar.

examples.chinese: 你们的中文水平差不多。
examples.pinyin: nǐmen de zhōngwén shǔipíng chàbùduō 。
examples.english: Your Chinese level is similar.

title: Assessing situations with 'kanlai'
explanation: Assessing situations with 'kanlai'. Used for referring to the future.

examples.chinese: 看来他不来了，都这么晚了。
examples.pinyin: kànláitābùláile，dūzhèyāowǎnle 。
examples.english: It seems that he is not coming, so late.

examples.chinese: 看来你玩得不高兴，怎么这么早就回来了？
examples.pinyin: kànláinǐwándébùgāoxīng，zěnyāozhèyāozǎojìuhúiláile ？
examples.english: It seems that you are not happy, how come back so early?

examples.chinese: 现在看来，事情没那么糟。
examples.pinyin: xiànzàikànlái，shìqíngméinàyāozāo 。
examples.english: Now it seems that things are not so bad.

examples.chinese: 在我看来，不会花钱的人就不会享受生活。
examples.pinyin: zàiwǒkànlái，bù hùi huā qián de rén jìu bù hùi xiǎngshòu shēnghuó 。
examples.english: In my opinion, people who do not spend money will not enjoy life.

examples.chinese: 在他看来，公司大小不重要，重要的是老板好不好。
examples.pinyin: zàitākànlái，gōngsī dàxiǎo bùzhòngyào，zhòngyàodeshìlǎobǎnhǎobùhǎo 。
examples.english: In his opinion, the size of the company is not important, what matters is whether the boss is good or not.

title: Coincidence with 'zhenghao'
explanation: Coincidence with 'zhenghao'. Used for indicating conditions, sequencing events in time.

examples.chinese: 我正好要出去，垃圾我来扔吧。
examples.pinyin: wǒ zhènghǎo yào chūqù ，lājí wǒ lái rēng ba 。
examples.english: I was about to go out, let me throw the garbage.

examples.chinese: 你来了！我正好要找你。
examples.pinyin: nǐ lái le ！wǒ zhènghǎo yào zhǎo nǐ 。
examples.english: You came! I happened to find you.

examples.chinese: 他正好问了我想问的问题。
examples.pinyin: tā zhènghǎo wèn le wǒ xiǎng wèn de wèntí 。
examples.english: He happened to ask the question I wanted to ask.

examples.chinese: 我正好也在这里实习。
examples.pinyin: wǒ zhènghǎo yě zài zhèlǐ shíxí 。
examples.english: I happened to be an intern here too.

examples.chinese: 正好你们都是单身。
examples.pinyin: zhènghǎo nǐmen dū shì dānshēn 。
examples.english: It happens that you are all single.

title: Emphasizing negation with 'you'
explanation: Emphasizing negation with 'you'. Used for expressing attitude, emphasizing.

examples.chinese: 问我干吗？
examples.pinyin: wèn wǒ gānma ？
examples.english: Ask me why?

examples.chinese: 这些菜又没坏，为什么要扔？
examples.pinyin: zhèxiē cài yòu méi huài ，wèishíyāo yào rēng ？
examples.english: These dishes are not bad, why throw them?

examples.chinese: 不要生气，我又不是故意的。
examples.pinyin: bùyào shēngqì ，wǒ yòu bù shì gùyì de 。
examples.english: Don't be angry, I didn't mean it.

examples.chinese: 今天又不热，开空调干吗？
examples.pinyin: jīntiān yòu bù rè ，kāi kōngdiào gānma ？
examples.english: It's not hot today, why turn on the air conditioner?

examples.chinese: 明天又不上班，那么早起床干吗？
examples.pinyin: míngtiān yòu bù shàngbān ，nàyāo zǎo qǐchuáng gānma ？
examples.english: Don't go to work tomorrow, so why get up early?

title: Emphatic adverb 'ke'
explanation: Emphatic adverb 'ke'. Used for emphasizing, expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 这只小狗可淘气了！
examples.pinyin: zhè zhǐ xiǎo gǒu kě táoqì le！
examples.english: This puppy is naughty!

examples.chinese: 哇，这个糖醋里脊可好吃了！
examples.pinyin: wā，zhè gè tángcù lǐjí kě hǎochī le！
examples.english: Wow, this sweet and sour tenderloin is delicious!

examples.chinese: 你可来了!
examples.pinyin: nǐ kě lái le!
examples.english: You are here!

examples.chinese: 你可别喝太多酒。
examples.pinyin: nǐ kě bié hē tài duō jǐu 。
examples.english: Don't drink too much alcohol.

examples.chinese: 你可别走！
examples.pinyin: nǐ kě bié zǒu！
examples.english: Don't go!

title: Expressing 'all along' with 'yuanlai'
structure: 原来 + 的 + Noun  /  Subj. + 原来 + Predicate
explanation: Expressing 'all along' with 'yuanlai'. Used for explaining, justifying.

examples.chinese: 你原来的发型也很可爱。
examples.pinyin: nǐ yuánlái de fāxíng yě hěn kěài 。
examples.english: Your original hairstyle is also very cute.

examples.chinese: 这件衣服原来的价格是999块。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn yīfú yuánlái de jiàgé shì 999 kuài 。
examples.english: The original price of this dress was 999 pieces.

examples.chinese: 她们原来只是邻居，现在是很好的朋友。
examples.pinyin: tāmen yuánlái zhǐshì línjū ，xiànzài shì hěnhǎo de péngyǒu 。
examples.english: They used to be only neighbors, and now they are very good friends.

examples.chinese: 我们原来住在浦东，几个月以前搬到了这里。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen yuánlái zhù zài pǔdōng ，jī gè yuè yǐqián bān dào le zhèlǐ 。
examples.english: We originally lived in Pudong and moved here a few months ago.

examples.chinese: 原来她是他的中文老师，现在是他老婆。
examples.pinyin: yuánlái tā shì tā de zhōngwén lǎoshī，xiànzài shì tā lǎopó 。
examples.english: It turned out that she was his Chinese teacher and now he is his wife.

title: Expressing 'almost' using 'chadian'
structure: Subj. + 差点 + Predicate  /  Subj. + 差点 (+就) + Predicate + 了
explanation: Expressing 'almost' using 'chadian'. Used for describing actions.

examples.chinese: 车差点撞到我。
examples.pinyin: chē chàdiǎn zhuàngdào wǒ 。
examples.english: The car almost hit me.

examples.chinese: 我们差点相信他。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen chàdiǎn xiāngxìn tā 。
examples.english: We almost believed him.

examples.chinese: 他们差点打起来。
examples.pinyin: tāmen chàdiǎn dǎ qǐlái 。
examples.english: They almost fought.

examples.chinese: 我差点忘了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ chàdiǎn wàng le 。
examples.english: I almost forgot.

examples.chinese: 我今天差点迟到了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ jīntiān chàdiǎn chídào le 。
examples.english: I was almost late today.

title: Expressing 'always' with 'conglai'
structure: Subj. + 从来 + 都 (是) + Predicate
explanation: Expressing 'always' with 'conglai'. Used for referring to the past, expressing frequency.

examples.chinese: 他从来都这样。
examples.pinyin: tā cónglái dū zhèyáng 。
examples.english: He has always been like this.

examples.chinese: 她从来都这么晚睡。
examples.pinyin: tā cónglái dū zhèyāo wǎn shùi 。
examples.english: She has never slept so late.

examples.chinese: 他说话从来都很大声。
examples.pinyin: tā shuōhuà cónglái dū hěn dàshēng 。
examples.english: He always speaks very loudly.

examples.chinese: 我们学校的学生从来都只能穿校服。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen xuéxiào de xuéshēng cónglái dū zhǐ néng chuān xiàofú 。
examples.english: Students in our school can only wear school uniforms.

examples.chinese: 成功从来都要靠自己努力。
examples.pinyin: chénggōng cónglái dū yào kào zìjǐ nǔlì 。
examples.english: Success always depends on yourself.

title: Expressing 'as a result' with 'jieguo'
explanation: Expressing 'as a result' with 'jieguo'. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 她穿得很少，结果感冒了。
examples.pinyin: tā chuān dé hěn shǎo ，jiéguǒ gǎnmào le 。
examples.english: She wore very little and got a cold.

examples.chinese: 我太紧张了，结果说错了很多。
examples.pinyin: wǒ tài jǐnzhāng le ，jiéguǒ shuō cuò le hěn duō 。
examples.english: I was so nervous that I was wrong.

examples.chinese: 他开得太快了，结果撞到了一个人。
examples.pinyin: tā kāi dé tài kuài le ，jiéguǒ zhuàngdào le yī gè rén 。
examples.english: He drove too fast and hit a man.

examples.chinese: 他没好好复习，结果考试没考好。
examples.pinyin: tā méi hǎohǎo fùxí，jiéguǒ kǎoshì méi kǎo hǎo 。
examples.english: He didn't review well, but he didn't do well in the exam.

examples.chinese: 他总是迟到，结果老板炒了他的鱿鱼。
examples.pinyin: tā zǒngshì chídào ，jiéguǒ lǎobǎn chǎo le tā de yóuyú 。
examples.english: He was always late and the boss fired his squid.

title: Expressing concern with 'kongpa'
explanation: Expressing concern with 'kongpa'. Used for expressing concern.

examples.chinese: 今天恐怕要下雨。
examples.pinyin: jīntiān kǒngpà yào xiàyǔ 。
examples.english: I'm afraid it will rain today.

examples.chinese: 这是很重要的决定，你恐怕不能这么着急。
examples.pinyin: zhè shì hěnzhòngyào de juédìng ，nǐ kǒngpà bù néng zhèyāo zháojí 。
examples.english: This is a very important decision, I am afraid you should not be so anxious.

examples.chinese: 老婆，我晚上要加班，恐怕不能回家吃晚饭了。
examples.pinyin: lǎopó ，wǒ wǎnshàng yào jiābān ，kǒngpà bù néng húijiā chī wǎnfàn le 。
examples.english: Wife, I have to work overtime at night. I'm afraid I can't go home for dinner.

examples.chinese: 这个颜色太粉了，恐怕我女儿不喜欢。
examples.pinyin: zhègè yánsè tài fěn le ，kǒngpà wǒnv̌ér bù xǐhuān 。
examples.english: This color is too pink, I am afraid my daughter does not like it.

examples.chinese: 这件事恐怕得你帮忙。
examples.pinyin: zhèjiànshì kǒngpà dé nǐ bāngmáng 。
examples.english: I'm afraid you need help in this matter.

title: Expressing 'enough' with 'gou'
explanation: Expressing 'enough' with 'gou'. Used for expressing attitude, describing degree.

examples.chinese: 我们买了很多菜，够吃了。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen mǎi le hěn duō cài ，gòu chī le 。
examples.english: We bought a lot of vegetables, enough to eat.

examples.chinese: 这些纸够用吗？
examples.pinyin: zhèxiē zhǐ gòu yòng ma ？
examples.english: Is this paper enough?

examples.chinese: 放心吧，我带的钱够花。
examples.pinyin: fàngxīn ba ，wǒ dài de qián gòu huā 。
examples.english: Rest assured, I have enough money to spend.

examples.chinese: 我对你够好了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ dùi nǐ gòu hǎo le 。
examples.english: I'm good enough for you.

examples.chinese: 别抱怨了，你够幸运了。
examples.pinyin: bié bàoyuàn le ，nǐ gòu xìngyùn le 。
examples.english: Don't complain, you are lucky enough.

title: Expressing 'even' with 'shenzhi'
structure: A，B，甚至 C + 都 / 也 ⋯⋯
explanation: Expressing 'even' with 'shenzhi'. Used for expressing determination.

examples.chinese: 每个观众甚至裁判都站起来给他鼓掌。
examples.pinyin: měi gè guānzhòng shénzhì cáipàn dū zhàn qǐlái gěi tā gǔzhǎng 。
examples.english: Every audience and even the referee stood up and applauded him.

examples.chinese: 我去过很多中国的城市，北京、上海、杭州、昆明、桂林，甚至拉萨我也去过。
examples.pinyin: wǒ qù guò hěn duō zhōngguó de chéngshì，běijīng、shànghǎi、hángzhōu、kūnmíng、gùilín，shénzhì lāsà wǒ yě qù guò 。
examples.english: I have been to many cities in China, including Beijing, Shanghai, Hangzhou, Kunming, Guilin, and even Lhasa.

examples.chinese: 他很喜欢玩手机，吃饭的时候，坐地铁的时候，甚至上厕所的时候也在玩。
examples.pinyin: tā hěn xǐhuān wán shǒujī，chīfàn deshíhòu，zuò dìtiě deshíhòu，shénzhì shàng cèsuǒ deshíhòu yě zài wán 。
examples.english: He likes to play with mobile phones, when eating, when taking the subway, and even when going to the toilet.

examples.chinese: 他太忙了，甚至连吃中饭的时间都没有。
examples.pinyin: tā tài máng le，shénzhì lián chī zhōngfàn de shíjiān dū méiyǒu 。
examples.english: He was too busy to even have time for lunch.

examples.chinese: 他从来不聊工作的事，甚至跟他老婆也不说。
examples.pinyin: tā cónglái bù liáo gōngzuò de shì，shénzhì gēn tā lǎopó yě bù shuō 。
examples.english: He never talked about work, not even to his wife.

title: Expressing 'had better' with 'haishi'
explanation: Expressing 'had better' with 'haishi'. Used for expressing obligations, expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 还是明天去吧。
examples.pinyin: huánshì míngtiān qù ba 。
examples.english: Let's go tomorrow.

examples.chinese: 还是让她进来吧。
examples.pinyin: huánshì ràng tā jìnlái ba 。
examples.english: Let her come in.

examples.chinese: 你还是快点走吧。
examples.pinyin: nǐ huánshì kuàidiǎn zǒu ba 。
examples.english: You should go quickly.

examples.chinese: 我们还是帮帮他吧。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen huánshì bāngbāng tā ba 。
examples.english: Let's help him.

examples.chinese: 太晚了，还是先回家吧。
examples.pinyin: tài wǎn le ，huánshì xiān húijiā ba 。
examples.english: It's too late, let's go home first.

title: Expressing 'had better' with 'zuihao'
structure: Subj. + 最好 ( + 别 / 不要 ) + Predicate
explanation: Expressing 'had better' with 'zuihao'. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 你最好先休息一下。
examples.pinyin: nǐ zùihǎo xiān xīuxī yīxià 。
examples.english: You'd better take a break first.

examples.chinese: 你们最好给他打个电话问一下。
examples.pinyin: nǐmen zùihǎo gěi tā dǎ gè diànhuà wèn yīxià 。
examples.english: You better call him and ask.

examples.chinese: 那个地方不好找，我们最好查一下百度地图。
examples.pinyin: nàgè dìfāng bù hǎo zhǎo ，wǒmen zùihǎo chá yīxià bǎidù dìtú 。
examples.english: That place is not easy to find, we better check Baidu map.

examples.chinese: 外面挺冷的，最好多穿点。
examples.pinyin: wàimiàn tǐng lěng de，zùihǎo duō chuān diǎn 。
examples.english: It's cold outside, it's best to wear more.

examples.chinese: 这个活动很重要，我们最好穿得正式一点。
examples.pinyin: zhègè huódòng hěn zhòngyào，wǒmen zùihǎo chuān dé zhèngshì yīdiǎn 。
examples.english: This event is very important, we better dress more formally.

title: Expressing 'in the end' with 'daodi'
explanation: Expressing 'in the end' with 'daodi'. Used for exclaiming.

examples.chinese: 到底是个大老板，出手就是大方。
examples.pinyin: dàodǐ shì gè dà lǎobǎn，chūshǒu jìushì dàfāng 。
examples.english: In the end is a big boss, the shot is generous.

examples.chinese: 到底是个高手，这么快就把问题解决了！"Heisamaster,afterall...")
examples.pinyin: dàodǐ shì gè gāoshǒu，zhèyāo kuài jìu bǎ wèntí jiějué le！"He is a master, after all...")
examples.english: In the end is a master, so quickly solved the problem! "Heisamaster, afterall ...")

examples.chinese: 到底还是孩子，有些事情他不懂是很正常的。
examples.pinyin: dàodǐ huán shì háizǐ，yǒuxiē shìqíng tā bù dǒng shì hěn zhèngcháng de 。
examples.english: In the end, it is still a child, and it is normal for him not to understand some things.

examples.chinese: 你到底怎么了？
examples.pinyin: nǐ dàodǐ zěnyāo le ？
examples.english: What happened to you?

examples.chinese: 到底怎么走？
examples.pinyin: dàodǐ zěnyāo zǒu ？
examples.english: What the hell is going on?

title: Expressing 'in the end' with 'jiujing'
explanation: Expressing 'in the end' with 'jiujing'

examples.chinese: 这个人究竟是谁？
examples.pinyin: zhè gè rén jīujìng shì shúi ？
examples.english: Who is this person?

examples.chinese: 你究竟是做什么的？
examples.pinyin: nǐ jīujìng shì zuò shíyāo de ？
examples.english: What are you doing?

examples.chinese: 他们究竟什么时候到？
examples.pinyin: tāmen jīujìng shíyāo shíhòu dào ？
examples.english: When will they arrive?

examples.chinese: 我们究竟还要等多久？
examples.pinyin: wǒmen jīujìng huán yào děng duōjǐu ？
examples.english: How long do we have to wait?

examples.chinese: 你们究竟想让我怎么做？
examples.pinyin: nǐmen jīujìng xiǎng ràng wǒ zěnyāo zuò ？
examples.english: What exactly do you want me to do?

title: Expressing 'just' with 'gang'
structure: Subj. + 刚 / 刚刚  + Verb (+ Obj.) + Duration
explanation: Expressing 'just' with 'gang'. Used for sequencing events in time, expressing time and date.

examples.chinese: 我们刚知道。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen gāng zhīdào 。
examples.english: We just knew.

examples.chinese: 她们刚走。
examples.pinyin: tāmen gāng zǒu 。
examples.english: They just left.

examples.chinese: 老板刚刚到办公室。
examples.pinyin: lǎobǎn gānggāng dào bàngōngshì 。
examples.english: The boss has just arrived at the office.

examples.chinese: 我老婆刚生完孩子。
examples.pinyin: wǒ lǎopó gāng shēng wán háizǐ 。
examples.english: My wife just had a baby.

examples.chinese: 你刚刚下班吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐ gānggāng xiàbān ma ？
examples.english: Did you just leave work?

title: Expressing 'one by one' with 'yi'
structure: 一 + Measure Word + 一 + Measure Word (+ Noun)
explanation: Expressing 'one by one' with 'yi'. Used for expressing quantity.

examples.chinese: 别吵，一个一个说。
examples.pinyin: bié chǎo ，yī gè yī gè shuō 。
examples.english: Don't be noisy, say one by one.

examples.chinese: 别着急，一点一点做。
examples.pinyin: bié zháojí ，yī diǎn yī diǎn zuò 。
examples.english: Don't worry, do it little by little.

examples.chinese: 请一个房间一个房间检查。
examples.pinyin: qǐng yī gè fángjiān yī gè fángjiān jiǎnchá 。
examples.english: Please check room by room.

examples.chinese: 别拿那么多，一个一个拿。
examples.pinyin: bié ná nàyāo duō ，yī gè yī gè ná 。
examples.english: Don't take so many, take one by one.

examples.chinese: 宝宝一天一天在长大。
examples.pinyin: bǎobǎo yī tiān yī tiān zài chángdà 。
examples.english: The baby grows up day by day.

title: Expressing 'originally' with 'benlai'
structure: Subj. + 本来 + 是 +（不）要 / 会 / 应该 + Verb + 的，但是 / 可是 ...
explanation: Expressing 'originally' with 'benlai'. Used for explaining, justifying.

examples.chinese: 我本来是要去的，不过后来不太舒服，就没去。
examples.pinyin: wǒ běnlái shì yào qù de，bùguò hòulái bù tài shūfú ，jìu méi qù 。
examples.english: I was going to go, but later I was not very comfortable, so I didn't go.

examples.chinese: 他本来是应该考得更好的，可是那天他生病了。
examples.pinyin: tā běnlái shì yìnggāi kǎo dé gèng hǎo de ，kěshì nàtiān tā shēngbìng le 。
examples.english: He should have had a better test, but he was sick that day.

examples.chinese: 我们本来想去找他帮忙的，可是他那么忙，就没去。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen běnlái xiǎng qù zhǎo tā bāngmáng de，kěshì tā nàyāo máng ，jìu méi qù 。
examples.english: We wanted to go to him for help, but he was so busy that he didn't go.

examples.chinese: 这些工作本来是要今天做完的，不过明天做也可以。
examples.pinyin: zhèxiē gōngzuò běnlái shì yào jīntiān zuòwán de ，bùguò míngtiān zuò yě kěyǐ 。
examples.english: The work was originally done today, but it can be done tomorrow.

examples.chinese: 我本来要跟他结婚的，可是后来发现了我们真的不合适。
examples.pinyin: wǒ běnlái yào gēn tā jiéhūn de ，kěshì hòulái fāxiàn le wǒmen zhēnde bù héshì 。
examples.english: I was going to marry him, but then I found out that we were really inappropriate.

title: Expressing 'small quantity' with 'jiu'
explanation: Expressing 'small quantity' with 'jiu'. Used for describing actions, describing things.

examples.chinese: 这件事就我知道。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì jìu wǒ zhīdào 。
examples.english: I know this.

examples.chinese: 我们都忘了，就他还记得。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen dū wàng le ，jìu tā huán jìdé 。
examples.english: We all forgot, even he remembered.

examples.chinese: 大家都下班了，就老板还没走。
examples.pinyin: dàjiā dū xiàbān le ，jìu lǎobǎn huán méi zǒu 。
examples.english: Everyone is off work, but the boss hasn't left yet.

examples.chinese: 其他的菜都很好吃，就这两个菜有点咸。
examples.pinyin: qítā de cài dū hěn hǎochī，jìu zhè liǎng gè cài yǒudiǎn xián 。
examples.english: The other dishes are delicious, but these two dishes are a bit salty.

examples.chinese: 你觉得别人都是傻子吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐ juédé biérén dū shì shǎzǐ ma ？
examples.english: Do you think everyone is a fool?

title: Expressing the unexpected with 'jingran'
explanation: Expressing the unexpected with 'jingran'. Used for expressing surprise.

examples.chinese: 没想到你竟然当着老师的面撒谎。
examples.pinyin: méixiǎngdào nǐ jìngrán dāng zháo lǎoshī de miàn sāhuǎng 。
examples.english: I didn't expect you to lie in front of the teacher.

examples.chinese: 这是一件让人难过的事情，你竟然还笑？
examples.pinyin: zhè shì yī jiàn ràng rén nánguò de shìqíng ，nǐ jìngrán huán xiào ？
examples.english: This is a sad thing, you still laugh?

examples.chinese: 他那么努力，竟然没考及格！
examples.pinyin: tā nàyāo nǔlì ，jìngrán méi kǎo jígé ！
examples.english: He tried so hard that he failed the exam!

examples.chinese: 那个人骗了你的钱，你竟不生他的气？
examples.pinyin: nàgèrén piàn le nǐ de qián ，nǐ jìng bù shēng tā de qì ？
examples.english: That man cheated your money, you are not angry with him?

examples.chinese: 大家都以为他不会答应，可是他竟然答应了。
examples.pinyin: dàjiā dū yǐwèi tā bù hùi dáyìng ，kěshì tā jìngrán dáyìng le 。
examples.english: Everyone thought he would not agree, but he did.

title: Expressing 'to make certain' with 'qianwan'
explanation: Expressing 'to make certain' with 'qianwan'. Used for giving commands.

examples.chinese: 这个菜很难吃，千万不要点！
examples.pinyin: zhè gè cài hěn nánchī，qiānwàn bùyào diǎn！
examples.english: This dish is awful, don't order it!

examples.chinese: 那里太危险了，千万不要去！
examples.pinyin: nàlǐ tài wēixiǎn le，qiānwàn bùyào qù！
examples.english: It's too dangerous, don't go!

examples.chinese: 他们的产品是假的，你千万不要买！
examples.pinyin: tāmen de chǎnpǐn shì jiǎ de，nǐ qiānwàn bùyào mǎi！
examples.english: Their products are fake, you must not buy them!

examples.chinese: 他不是什么好人，千万不要相信他！
examples.pinyin: tā bù shì shíyāo hǎorén，qiānwàn bùyào xiāngxìn tā！
examples.english: He is not a good person, don't believe him!

examples.chinese: 孩子有错，父母可以教育他，但千万不能打孩子。
examples.pinyin: háizǐ yǒu cuò，fùmǔ kěyǐ jiàoyù tā， dàn qiānwàn bù néng dǎ háizǐ 。
examples.english: The child is wrong, parents can educate him, but never beat the child.

title: Rhetorical questions with 'nandao'
explanation: Rhetorical questions with 'nandao'. Used for asking questions, expressing a rhetorical question.

examples.chinese: 难道你真的相信他吗？
examples.pinyin: nándào nǐ zhēnde xiāngxìn tā ma ？
examples.english: Do you really believe him?

examples.chinese: 难道你是我妈吗？
examples.pinyin: nándào nǐ shì wǒ mā ma ？
examples.english: Are you my mother?

examples.chinese: 今天是我的生日，难道你不知道吗？
examples.pinyin: jīntiān shì wǒ de shēngrì，nándào nǐ bù zhīdào ma ？
examples.english: Today is my birthday, do n’t you know?

examples.chinese: 你父母这么关心你，难道你一点都感觉不到吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐ fùmǔ zhèyāo guānxīn nǐ， nándào nǐ yīdiǎn dū gǎnjué bùdào ma ？
examples.english: Your parents care so much about you, don't you feel it at all?

examples.chinese: 他这么帅，又这么有钱，难道你不想嫁给他吗？
examples.pinyin: tā zhèyāo shuài，yòu zhèyāo yǒuqián，nándào nǐ bù xiǎng jià gěi tā ma ？
examples.english: He is so handsome and so rich, don't you want to marry him?

title: Sequencing with 'xian' and 'zai'
structure: 先 ⋯⋯ ，再 ⋯⋯  /  先 + [Verb Phrase] + 再说
explanation: Sequencing with 'xian' and 'zai'. Used for sequencing events in time, expressing order, listing.

examples.chinese: 先洗手再吃。
examples.pinyin: xiān xǐ shǒu zài chī 。
examples.english: Wash your hands before eating.

examples.chinese: 我喜欢先洗澡，再睡觉。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuān xiān xǐzǎo ，zài shùijué 。
examples.english: I like to take a bath before sleeping.

examples.chinese: 请你先买票再进去。
examples.pinyin: qǐng nǐ xiān mǎi piào zài jìnqù 。
examples.english: Please buy a ticket before entering.

examples.chinese: 你要先做作业，再看电视。
examples.pinyin: nǐ yào xiān zuò zuòyè ，zài kàn diànshì 。
examples.english: You have to do your homework before watching TV.

examples.chinese: 我想先找工作，再搬家。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng xiān zhǎo gōngzuò ，zài bānjiā 。
examples.english: I want to find a job before moving.

title: Using 'ye' and 'dou' together
structure: Subj. + 也都 （ + 不 / 没） + Predicate
explanation: Using 'ye' and 'dou' together. Used for expressing quantity.

examples.chinese: 我很好，我的家人也都很好。
examples.pinyin: wǒ hěn hǎo ，wǒ de jiārén yě dū hěn hǎo 。
examples.english: I am fine, and my family are fine.

examples.chinese: 大人很喜欢这个餐厅，孩子们也都很喜欢。
examples.pinyin: dàrén hěn xǐhuān zhègè cāntīng ，háizǐ men yě dū hěn xǐhuān 。
examples.english: Adults like this restaurant very much, and children like it too.

examples.chinese: 我老板是美国人，很多客户也都是美国人。
examples.pinyin: wǒ lǎobǎn shì měiguó rén ，hěn duō kèhù yě dū shì měiguó rén 。
examples.english: My boss is American and many customers are also American.

examples.chinese: 他很高，他的两个弟弟也都比较高。
examples.pinyin: tā hěn gāo ，tā de liǎng gè dìdì yě dū bǐjiào gāo 。
examples.english: He is tall, and his two younger brothers are taller.

examples.chinese: 老板加班，你们也都要加班吗？
examples.pinyin: lǎobǎn jiābān ，nǐmen yě dū yào jiābān ma ？
examples.english: The boss works overtime, do you have to work overtime too?

title: Expressing 'quite' with 'ting'
explanation: Expressing 'quite' with 'ting'. Used for expressing degree.

examples.chinese: 这个老师挺年轻的。
examples.pinyin: zhègè lǎoshī tǐng niánqīng de 。
examples.english: This teacher is quite young.

examples.chinese: 你男朋友挺帅的。
examples.pinyin: nǐ nánpéngyǒu tǐng shuài de 。
examples.english: Your boyfriend is very handsome.

examples.chinese: 最近大家都挺忙的。
examples.pinyin: zùijìn dàjiā dū tǐng máng de 。
examples.english: Everyone has been busy recently.

examples.chinese: 这件衣服大小挺合适的。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn yīfú dàxiǎo tǐng héshì de 。
examples.english: This dress is quite the right size.

examples.chinese: 他家不是挺有钱的吗？
examples.pinyin: tā jiā bùshì tǐng yǒuqián de ma ？
examples.english: Isn't his family rich?

title: Ending a non-exhaustive list with 'shenme de'
explanation: Ending a non-exhaustive list with 'shenme de'. Used for listing.

examples.chinese: 我奶奶不吃肉，只吃蔬菜、豆腐什么的。
examples.pinyin: wǒ nǎinǎi bù chī ròu ，zhǐ chī shūcài 、dòufǔ shíyāode 。
examples.english: My grandma doesn't eat meat, only vegetables, tofu or something.

examples.chinese: 养狗很麻烦，你要喂它，给它洗澡，跟它玩什么的。
examples.pinyin: yǎnggǒu hěn máfán ，nǐ yào wèi tā ，gěi tā xǐzǎo ，gēn tā wán shíyāode 。
examples.english: Keeping a dog is troublesome, you have to feed it, bathe it, play with it.

examples.chinese: 数学、物理、化学什么的，我都不感兴趣。
examples.pinyin: shùxué 、wùlǐ 、huàxué shíyāode ，wǒ dū bù gǎnxīngqù 。
examples.english: I'm not interested in mathematics, physics, chemistry or anything.

examples.chinese: 我喜欢实用的礼物，手表、衣服、书什么的。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuān shíyòng de lǐwù ，shǒubiǎo 、yīfú 、shū shíyāode 。
examples.english: I like practical gifts, watches, clothes and books.

examples.chinese: 我们见面一般就是吃饭、聊天什么的。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen jiànmiàn yībān jìushì chīfàn、liáotiān shíyāode 。
examples.english: When we meet, we usually eat or chat.

title: Non-exhaustive lists with 'dengdeng'
structure: A1，A2 ⋯⋯ 等 / 等等  /  A1，A2 ⋯⋯ 等 + [Category] + Predicate
explanation: Non-exhaustive lists with 'dengdeng'. Used for listing.

examples.chinese: 西瓜、菠萝、葡萄等等，我都喜欢吃。
examples.pinyin: xīguā、bōluó、pútáo děngděng ，wǒ dū xǐhuān chī 。
examples.english: I like watermelons, pineapples, grapes, etc.

examples.chinese: 我爸爸很喜欢运动，比如跑步、游泳、打羽毛球等等。
examples.pinyin: wǒ bàbà hěn xǐhuān yùndòng ，bǐrú pǎobù、yóuyǒng、dǎyǔmáoqíu děngděng 。
examples.english: My dad likes sports, such as running, swimming, playing badminton, etc.

examples.chinese: BruceLi、JackieChan、JetLi等都是功夫明星。
examples.pinyin: Bruce Li、Jackie Chan、Jet Li děng dū shì gōngfū míngxīng 。
examples.english: BruceLi, JackieChan, JetLi, etc. are all kung fu stars.

examples.chinese: 我们公司有市场部、设计部、技术部等等。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen gōngsī yǒu shìchángbù、shèjìbù、jìzhúbù děngděng 。
examples.english: Our company has marketing department, design department, technology department and so on.

examples.chinese: 联合国的工作语言有英语、法语、西班牙语等。
examples.pinyin: liánhéguó de gōngzuò yǔyán yǒu yīngyǔ、fǎyǔ、xībānyáyǔ děng 。
examples.english: The working languages ​​of the United Nations are English, French and Spanish.

title: A softer 'but' with 'buguo'
explanation: A softer 'but' with 'buguo'. Used for contrasting, connecting ideas.

examples.chinese: 这件衣服我很喜欢，不过有点贵。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn yīfú wǒ hěn xǐhuān ，bùguò yǒudiǎn gùi 。
examples.english: I like this dress, but it's a bit expensive.

examples.chinese: 这家餐厅我没去过，不过我听说还不错。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiā cāntīng wǒ méi qù guò ，bùguò wǒ tīngshuō huán bùcuò 。
examples.english: I haven't been to this restaurant, but I heard it's not bad.

examples.chinese: 这个学生很聪明，不过有点懒。
examples.pinyin: zhègè xuéshēng hěn cōngmíng ，bùguò yǒudiǎn lǎn 。
examples.english: This student is very smart, but a little lazy.

examples.chinese: 那儿的天气不太好，不过我们玩得很开心。
examples.pinyin: nàér de tiānqì bù tài hǎo ，bùguò wǒmen wán dé hěn kāixīn 。
examples.english: The weather there is not very good, but we had a great time.

examples.chinese: 他是东北人，不过他没有口音。
examples.pinyin: tā shì dōngběi rén ，bùguò tā méiyǒu kǒuyīn 。
examples.english: He is from the Northeast, but he has no accent.

title: Expressing 'and then' with 'yushi'
explanation: Expressing 'and then' with 'yushi'. Used for expressing result, sequencing events in time, indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 我看大家都买了，于是我也买了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ kàn dàjiā dū mǎi le ，yúshì wǒ yě mǎi le 。
examples.english: I think everyone bought it, so I bought it.

examples.chinese: 昨天突然下雨了，于是我们取消了野餐的计划。
examples.pinyin: zuótiān tūrán xiàyǔle ，yúshì wǒmen qǔxiāo le yěcān de jìhuá 。
examples.english: It suddenly rained yesterday, so we canceled our picnic plan.

examples.chinese: 网站上的票已经卖光了，于是我们买了黄牛票。
examples.pinyin: wǎngzhànshàng de piào yǐjīng mài guāng le ，yúshì wǒmen mǎi le huángníupiào 。
examples.english: The tickets on the website have been sold out, so we bought the ox tickets.

examples.chinese: 他的英语太差了，于是，他妈妈给他请了一个英语家教。
examples.pinyin: tā de yīngyǔ tàichà le，yúshì ，tā māmā gěi tā qǐng le yīgè yīngyǔ jiājiào 。
examples.english: His English is too poor, so his mother invited him an English tutor.

examples.chinese: 她发现男朋友已经结婚了。
examples.pinyin: tā fāxiàn nánpéngyǒu yǐjīng jiéhūn le 。
examples.english: She discovered that her boyfriend was married.

title: Expressing 'in addition' with 'haiyou'
explanation: Expressing 'in addition' with 'haiyou'. Used for expressing quantity, listing.

examples.chinese: 你需要吃药。
examples.pinyin: nǐ xūyào chī yào 。
examples.english: You need to take medicine.

examples.chinese: 我要大杯，不要冰，还有，少放糖。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yào dàbēi ，bùyào bīng ，huányǒu ，shǎo fàng táng 。
examples.english: I want a large glass, no ice, and less sugar.

examples.chinese: 不要一边吃饭一边说话。
examples.pinyin: bùyào yībiān chīfàn yībiān shuōhuà 。
examples.english: Don't talk while eating.

examples.chinese: 考试的时候不要说话。
examples.pinyin: kǎoshì de shíhòu bùyào shuōhuà 。
examples.english: Don't talk during the exam.

examples.chinese: 他们不想要孩子。
examples.pinyin: tāmen bù xiǎng yào háizǐ 。
examples.english: They don't want children.

title: Expressing 'in addition' with 'lingwai'
explanation: Expressing 'in addition' with 'lingwai'. Used for giving alternatives, connecting ideas.

examples.chinese: 这个课文太难了，我不想学。
examples.pinyin: zhègè kèwén tài nán le ，wǒ bù xiǎng xué 。
examples.english: This text is too difficult, I don't want to learn it.

examples.chinese: 希望你不要再迟到了。
examples.pinyin: xīwàng nǐ bùyào zài chídào le 。
examples.english: I hope you will not be late again.

examples.chinese: 这个航班经常晚点。
examples.pinyin: zhègè hángbān jīngcháng wǎndiǎn 。
examples.english: This flight is often delayed.

examples.chinese: 我没时间参加这个活动。
examples.pinyin: wǒ méi shíjiān cānjiā zhègè huódòng 。
examples.english: I have no time to participate in this event.

examples.chinese: 幼儿园提供午餐。
examples.pinyin: yòuéryuán tígōng wǔcān 。
examples.english: The kindergarten provides lunch.

title: Expressing 'in addition' with 'zaishuo'
explanation: Expressing 'in addition' with 'zaishuo'. Used for adding more explanation, connecting ideas.

examples.chinese: 这么晚，别走了。
examples.pinyin: zhèyāo wǎn ，bié zǒu le 。
examples.english: So late, don't leave.

examples.chinese: 他喜欢，就让他去吧。
examples.pinyin: tā xǐhuān ，jìu ràng tā qù ba 。
examples.english: If he likes it, let him go.

examples.chinese: 那件衣服太贵了，我没买。
examples.pinyin: nà jiàn yīfú tài gùi le ，wǒ méi mǎi 。
examples.english: That dress is too expensive, I didn't buy it.

examples.chinese: 对不起，我没时间。
examples.pinyin: dùibùqǐ ，wǒ méi shíjiān 。
examples.english: I'm sorry, I don't have time.

examples.chinese: 别吃了，你已经吃了五个了。
examples.pinyin: bié chī le ，nǐ yǐjīng chī le wǔ gè le 。
examples.english: Stop eating, you have already eaten five.

title: Two words for 'but'
structure: Statement， 可是 / 但是 + [Contrary Statement]
explanation: Two words for 'but'. Used for contrasting, connecting ideas.

examples.chinese: 我喜欢他，可是他不喜欢我。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuān tā，kěshì tā bù xǐhuān wǒ 。
examples.english: I like him, but he doesn't like me.

examples.chinese: 我很想去，但是我太忙了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ hěn xiǎng qù，dànshì wǒ tài máng le 。
examples.english: I really want to go, but I am too busy.

examples.chinese: 中文很有意思，但是也很难。
examples.pinyin: zhōngwén hěn yǒuyìsī，dànshì yě hěn nán 。
examples.english: Chinese is interesting, but it is also difficult.

examples.chinese: 我喜欢这件衬衫，可是太贵了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuān zhè jiàn chènshān，kěshì tài gùi le 。
examples.english: I like this shirt, but it is too expensive.

examples.chinese: 老板昨天给他打电话，可是他没接。
examples.pinyin: lǎobǎn zuótiān gěi tā dǎ diànhuà，kěshì tā méi jiē 。
examples.english: The boss called him yesterday, but he missed it.

title: Using 'er' to explain contrasting ideas
structure: 是……，而不是……  /  不是……，而是……
explanation: Using 'er' to explain contrasting ideas. Used for contrasting, differentiating.

examples.chinese: 以后后悔的人不是我，而是你自己。
examples.pinyin: yǐhòu hòuhǔi de rén bù shì wǒ，ér shì nǐ zìjǐ 。
examples.english: The person who regrets later is not me, but yourself.

examples.chinese: 现在要做的不是责怪谁错了，而是怎么解决。
examples.pinyin: xiànzài yào zuò de bù shì zéguài shúi cuò le，ér shì zěnyāo jiějué 。
examples.english: What is to be done now is not to blame who is wrong, but how to solve it.

examples.chinese: 我没说不是想骗你，而是怕你不高兴。
examples.pinyin: wǒ méi shuō bù shì xiǎng piàn nǐ ，ér shì pà nǐ bù gāoxīng 。
examples.english: I didn't say that I didn't want to lie to you, but I was afraid that you would not be happy.

examples.chinese: 我不是不想帮你，而是没有能力帮你。
examples.pinyin: wǒ bù shì bù xiǎng bāng nǐ ，ér shì méiyǒu nénglì bāng nǐ 。
examples.english: I do n’t want to help you, but I ca n’t help you.

examples.chinese: 重要的不是你的外表，而是你的内心。
examples.pinyin: zhòngyào de bùshì nǐ de wàibiǎo ，érshì nǐ de nèixīn 。
examples.english: What matters is not your appearance, but your heart.

title: Using 'lai' to connect two verb phrases
structure: 通过 / 用 + Method + 来 + [Verb Phrase]
explanation: Using 'lai' to connect two verb phrases. Used for expressing purpose.

examples.chinese: 用这种方法来赚钱，真丢人。
examples.pinyin: yòng zhè zhǒng fāngfǎ lái zhuànqián ，zhēn dīurén 。
examples.english: Using this method to make money is really shameful.

examples.chinese: 很多年轻人用手机APP来点外卖。
examples.pinyin: hěn duō niánqīng rén yòng shǒujī APP lái diǎn wàimài 。
examples.english: Many young people use mobile apps to order takeaways.

examples.chinese: 父母不应该经常用钱来奖励孩子。
examples.pinyin: fùmǔ bù yìnggāi jīngcháng yòng qián lái jiǎnglì háizǐ 。
examples.english: Parents should not often use money to reward their children.

examples.chinese: 用这个APP来学汉字更容易。
examples.pinyin: yòng zhègè APP lái xué hànzì gèng róngyì 。
examples.english: It is easier to learn Chinese characters with this APP.

examples.chinese: 你可以通过微信来关注我们。
examples.pinyin: nǐ kěyǐ tōngguò wēixìn lái guānzhù wǒmen 。
examples.english: You can follow us on WeChat.

title: Expressing 'within (it/them)' with 'qizhong'
explanation: Expressing 'within (it/them)' with 'qizhong'

examples.chinese: 我有四辆汽车，其中三辆都是宝马。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yǒu sìliàng qìchē，qízhōng sān liàng dū shì bǎomǎ 。
examples.english: I have four cars, three of which are BMW.

examples.chinese: 到处都有孤独的人，我只是其中一个。
examples.pinyin: dàochù dū yǒu gūdú de rén，wǒ zhǐ shì qízhōng yī gè 。
examples.english: There are lonely people everywhere, and I am just one of them.

examples.chinese: 人类21世纪面临许多问题，其中最严重的是环境问题。
examples.pinyin: rénlèi 21 shìjì miànlín xǔduō wèntí，qízhōng zùi yánzhòng de shì huánjìng wèntí 。
examples.english: Human beings are facing many problems in the 21st century, the most serious of which are environmental problems.

examples.chinese: 工作虽然有时枯燥，但是我乐在其中。
examples.pinyin: gōngzuò sūirán yǒushí kūzào，dànshì wǒ lèzài qízhōng 。
examples.english: Although the work is sometimes boring, I enjoy it.

title: Expressing fractions with 'fenzhi'
explanation: Expressing fractions with 'fenzhi'. Used for expressing quantity.

examples.chinese: 我的手机电量只有百分之五了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ de shǒujī diànliàng zhǐ yǒu bǎi fēn zhī wǔ le 。
examples.english: My phone's battery is only 5%.

examples.chinese: 这个文件已经下载了三分之二。
examples.pinyin: zhègè wénjiàn yǐjīng xiàzài le sān fēn zhī èr 。
examples.english: This file has been downloaded by two thirds.

examples.chinese: 这篇文章有五分之三是抄别人的。
examples.pinyin: zhè piān wénzhāng yǒu wǔ fēn zhī sān shì chāo biérén de 。
examples.english: Three-fifths of this article was copied by others.

examples.chinese: 差不多三分之一的美国人有护照。
examples.pinyin: chàbùduō sān fēn zhī yī de měiguó rén yǒu hùzhào 。
examples.english: Almost one-third of Americans have passports.

examples.chinese: 我们学校四分之三的老师都是男老师。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen xuéxiào sì fēn zhī sān de lǎoshī dū shì nán lǎoshī 。
examples.english: Three quarters of the teachers in our school are male teachers.

title: Advanced yes-no questions with 'ma'
structure: Statement + 吗 ？  /  Confirmation + Question + 吗 ？
explanation: Advanced yes-no questions with 'ma'. Used for asking questions, requesting.

examples.chinese: 这是什么？
examples.pinyin: zhè shì shíyāo ？
examples.english: what is this?

examples.chinese: 你知道这是什么吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐ zhīdào zhè shì shíyāo ma ？
examples.english: Do you know what this is?

examples.chinese: 他是谁？
examples.pinyin: tā shì shúi ？
examples.english: Who is he?

examples.chinese: 你知道他是谁吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐ zhīdào tā shì shúi ma ？
examples.english: do you know who he is?

examples.chinese: 他叫什么名字？
examples.pinyin: tā jiào shíyāo míngzì ？
examples.english: What is his name?

title: Reviewing options with 'ba'
explanation: Reviewing options with 'ba'. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 冬天去吧，太冷；夏天去吧，太热。
examples.pinyin: dōngtiān qù ba ，tài lěng ；xiàtiān qù ba ，tài rè 。
examples.english: Go in winter, too cold; go in summer, too hot.

examples.chinese: 早点去吧，要等；晚点去吧，会堵车。
examples.pinyin: zǎo diǎn qù ba ，yào děng ；wǎn diǎn qù ba ，hùi dǔchē 。
examples.english: Go early, wait; if you go later, traffic jams will occur.

examples.chinese: 穿得多一点吧，会热；穿得少一点吧，会冷。
examples.pinyin: chuān dé duō yīdiǎn ba ，hùi rè ；chuān dé shǎo yīdiǎn ba ，hùi lěng 。
examples.english: Wear a little more, it will be hot; wear a little less, it will be cold.

examples.chinese: 去吧，要给红包；不去吧，他没面子。
examples.pinyin: qù ba ，yào gěi hóngbāo ；bù qù ba ，tā méi miànzǐ 。
examples.english: Go, give the red envelope; don't go, he has no face.

examples.chinese: 不说吧，他还会做错；说吧，他肯定不高兴。
examples.pinyin: bù shuō ba ，tā huán hùi zuò cuò ；shuō ba ，tā kěndìng bù gāoxīng 。
examples.english: Don't say it, he will still make mistakes; say it, he must be unhappy.

title: Using 'de' (modal particle)
explanation: Using 'de' (modal particle). Used for emphasizing.

examples.chinese: 他会好的。
examples.pinyin: tā hùi hǎo de 。
examples.english: He will be fine.

examples.chinese: 你可以的。
examples.pinyin: nǐ kěyǐ de 。
examples.english: you can.

examples.chinese: 她一定会来的。
examples.pinyin: tā yīdìng hùi lái de 。
examples.english: She will definitely come.

examples.chinese: 我们能搞定的。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen néng gǎodìng de 。
examples.english: We can do it.

examples.chinese: 他不会道歉的。
examples.pinyin: tā bù hùi dàoqiàn de 。
examples.english: He will not apologize.

title: Expressing 'along with…' with 'suizhe'
structure: Subj. + 随着 + Noun + Verb Phrase
explanation: Expressing 'along with…' with 'suizhe'. Used for referring to simultaneous events, indicating conditions.

examples.chinese: 树枝随着风不停地摇动。
examples.pinyin: shùzhī súizháo fēng bù tíng dì yáodòng 。
examples.english: The branches kept shaking with the wind.

examples.chinese: 孩子们随着音乐跳起了舞。
examples.pinyin: háizǐmensúizháo yīnlè tiào qǐ le wǔ 。
examples.english: The children danced to the music.

examples.chinese: 污染物随着人的呼吸进入了人体内部。
examples.pinyin: wūrǎn wù súizháo rén de hūxī jìnrùle réntǐ nèibù 。
examples.english: Contaminants enter the body with human breathing.

examples.chinese: 这些垃圾随着河水流到了大海。
examples.pinyin: zhèxiē lājí súizháo héshǔi líu dào le dàhǎi 。
examples.english: These rubbish flowed into the sea with the river.

examples.chinese: 我们随着他的琴声唱起了歌。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen súizháo tā de qínshēng chàng qǐ le gē 。
examples.english: We sang along with his piano voice.

title: Idiomatic phrases with 'zai'
explanation: Idiomatic phrases with 'zai'. Used for indicating conditions, expressing location.

examples.chinese: 在这个问题上，我们的看法是一样的。
examples.pinyin: zài zhè gè wèntí shàng ，wǒmen de kànfǎ shì yīyáng de 。
examples.english: On this issue, our views are the same.

examples.chinese: 在美国历史上，谁是最重要的总统？
examples.pinyin: zài měiguó lìshǐ shàng ，shúi shì zùi zhòngyào de zǒngtǒng ？
examples.english: Who is the most important president in American history?

examples.chinese: 这个句子在语法上没什么问题，但是不太自然。
examples.pinyin: zhègè jùzǐ zài yǔfǎ shàng méi shíyāo wèntí ，dànshì bù tài zìrán 。
examples.english: This sentence has no problem in grammar, but it is not natural.

examples.chinese: 南方人和北方人在生活习惯上有很多差异。
examples.pinyin: nánfāngrén hé běifāngrén zài shēnghuó xíguàn shàng yǒu hěnduō chàyì 。
examples.english: Southerners and northerners have many differences in their living habits.

examples.chinese: 在这样的环境下长大，孩子会快乐吗？
examples.pinyin: zài zhèyáng de huánjìng xià chángdà ，háizǐ hùi kuàilè ma ？
examples.english: Will children be happy when they grow up in such an environment?

title: Using 'yi... wei...'
explanation: Using 'yi... wei...'. Used for expressing a central concept.

examples.chinese: 以先进科技为手段，以发展生产力为目标。
examples.pinyin: yǐ xiānjìn kējì wèi shǒuduàn，yǐ fāzhǎn shēngchǎnlì wèi mùbiāo 。
examples.english: Take advanced technology as a means and develop productive forces as a goal.

examples.chinese: 许多外国企业在中国快速发展，以麦当劳为例，2000年有50家，现在有500家。
examples.pinyin: xǔduō wàiguó qǐyè zài zhōngguó kuàisù fāzhǎn，yǐ màidāngláo wèi lì，2000 nián yǒu 50 jiā，xiànzài yǒu 500 jiā 。
examples.english: Many foreign companies have developed rapidly in China. Taking McDonald's as an example, there were 50 in 2000 and now 500.

examples.chinese: 我们公司是以亚洲市场为主，以欧美市场为辅。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen gōngsī shì yǐ yàzhōu shìcháng wèi zhǔ，yǐ ōuměi shìcháng wèi fǔ 。
examples.english: Our company is based on the Asian market, supplemented by European and American markets.

examples.chinese: 以人为本
examples.pinyin: yǐrénwèiběn
examples.english: people oriented

examples.chinese: 民以食为天
examples.pinyin: mínyǐshíwèitiān
examples.english: People take food as the sky

title: Causative verbs
explanation: Causative verbs. Used for sentence patterns, giving commands.

examples.chinese: 你为什么不让我去？
examples.pinyin: nǐ wèishíyāo bù ràng wǒ qù ？
examples.english: Why don't you let me go?

examples.chinese: 这部电影让人很感动。
examples.pinyin: zhè bù diànyǐng ràng rén hěn gǎndòng 。
examples.english: This movie is very touching.

examples.chinese: 那个老人让我想到了我爷爷。
examples.pinyin: nàgè lǎorén ràng wǒ xiǎngdào le wǒ yéyé 。
examples.english: The old man reminded me of my grandpa.

examples.chinese: 他不听话，你叫我怎么办？
examples.pinyin: tā bù tīnghuà ，nǐ jiào wǒ zěnyāobàn ？
examples.english: He is disobedient, what should you do if you tell me?

examples.chinese: 他偷偷约别的女孩，你叫我怎么想？
examples.pinyin: tā tōutōu yuē biéde nv̌hái ，nǐ jiào wǒ zěnyāo xiǎng ？
examples.english: He secretly asked other girls, what do you think of me?

title: Expressing 'it depends' with 'kan'
structure: 这 / 那 + 要看 / 得看 + [Unclear Situation]
explanation: Expressing 'it depends' with 'kan'. Used for indicating conditions, adding more explanation, indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 这得看你的时间。
examples.pinyin: zhè dé kàn nǐ de shíjiān 。
examples.english: It depends on your time.

examples.chinese: 那要看他愿不愿意。
examples.pinyin: nà yào kàn tā yuàn bù yuànyì 。
examples.english: It depends on whether he is willing.

examples.chinese: 这得看天气怎么样。
examples.pinyin: zhè dé kàn tiānqì zěnyāoyáng 。
examples.english: It depends on the weather.

examples.chinese: 那要看老板怎么想。
examples.pinyin: nà yào kàn lǎobǎn zěnyāo xiǎng 。
examples.english: It depends on what the boss thinks.

examples.chinese: 那得看考试结果。
examples.pinyin: nà dé kàn kǎoshì jiéguǒ 。
examples.english: That depends on the test results.

title: Expressing 'it seems' with 'haoxiang'
explanation: Expressing 'it seems' with 'haoxiang'. Used for observing.

examples.chinese: 他好像是英国人。
examples.pinyin: tā hǎoxiàng shì yīngguó rén 。
examples.english: He seems to be British.

examples.chinese: 你好像不是本地人。
examples.pinyin: nǐ hǎoxiàng bù shì běndì rén 。
examples.english: You don't seem to be a local.

examples.chinese: 她好像生病了。
examples.pinyin: tā hǎoxiàng shēngbìng le 。
examples.english: She seems to be sick.

examples.chinese: 你好像很不喜欢她。
examples.pinyin: nǐ hǎoxiàng hěn bù xǐhuān tā 。
examples.english: You seem to dislike her very much.

examples.chinese: 王先生好像很怕他老婆。
examples.pinyin: wáng xiānshēng hǎoxiàng hěnpà tā lǎopó 。
examples.english: Mr. Wang seems afraid of his wife.

title: Expressing 'lies in' with 'zaiyu'
structure: ⋯⋯ 在于 ⋯⋯  /  ⋯⋯ 在于 + Person / Party
explanation: Expressing 'lies in' with 'zaiyu'. Used for expressing "it depends" with "kan".

examples.chinese: 我们服务的特色在于个性化。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen fúwù de tèsè zàiyú gèxìnghuà 。
examples.english: The characteristic of our service is personalization.

examples.chinese: 生命的意义在于给予和贡献。
examples.pinyin: shēngmìng de yìyì zàiyú gěiyú hé gòngxiàn 。
examples.english: The meaning of life lies in giving and contributing.

examples.chinese: 成功在于坚持。
examples.pinyin: chénggōng zàiyú jiānchí 。
examples.english: Success is about perseverance.

examples.chinese: 这个电影的意义在于揭露奴隶制度的罪恶。
examples.pinyin: zhègè diànyǐng de yìyì zàiyú jiēlù núlìzhìdù de zùiè 。
examples.english: The significance of this movie is to expose the evil of slavery.

examples.chinese: 礼物在于心意，不在于有多贵重。
examples.pinyin: lǐwù zàiyú xīnyì ，bù zàiyú yǒu duō gùizhòng 。
examples.english: The gift is in the heart, not how precious it is.

title: Expressing 'mistakenly think that' with 'yiwei'
explanation: Expressing 'mistakenly think that' with 'yiwei'. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 我以为他是德国人。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yǐwèi tā shì déguó rén 。
examples.english: I thought he was German.

examples.chinese: 我们以为你不在家。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen yǐwèi nǐ bù zài jiā 。
examples.english: We thought you were not at home.

examples.chinese: 你以为你是谁？
examples.pinyin: nǐ yǐwèi nǐ shì shúi ？
examples.english: who do you think You Are?

examples.chinese: 同事们都以为我二十岁。
examples.pinyin: tóngshì men dū yǐwèi wǒ èrshí sùi 。
examples.english: Colleagues thought I was 20 years old.

examples.chinese: 我们都以为你生气了。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen dū yǐwèi nǐ shēngqì le 。
examples.english: We all thought you were angry.

title: Expressing 'through' with 'tongguo'
explanation: Expressing 'through' with 'tongguo'. Used for expressing purpose.

examples.chinese: 从我家到那儿要通过两座桥。
examples.pinyin: cóng wǒ jiā dào nàér yào tōngguò liǎng zuò qiáo 。
examples.english: There are two bridges to get there from my house.

examples.chinese: 通过那个红色的大门，左拐就到了。
examples.pinyin: tōngguò nàgè hóngsè de dàmén ，zuǒguǎi jìu dào le 。
examples.english: Go through that red gate and turn left.

examples.chinese: 我通过了这个考试。
examples.pinyin: wǒ tōngguò le zhègè kǎoshì 。
examples.english: I passed this exam.

examples.chinese: 他没通过昨天的面试。
examples.pinyin: tā méi tōngguò zuótiān de miànshì 。
examples.english: He failed the interview yesterday.

examples.chinese: 那个穿黑衣服的男人没通过机场的安检。
examples.pinyin: nàgè chuān hēi yīfú de nánrén méi tōngguò jīcháng de ānjiǎn 。
examples.english: The man in black failed the security check at the airport.

title: Expressing 'to come from' with 'laizi'
explanation: Expressing 'to come from' with 'laizi'. Used for expressing to come from.

examples.chinese: 我来自中国。
examples.pinyin: wǒ láizì zhōngguó 。
examples.english: I come from China.

examples.chinese: 这些书都来自日本。
examples.pinyin: zhèxiē shū dū láizì rìběn 。
examples.english: These books are from Japan.

examples.chinese: 我们公司的客户来自美国。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen gōngsī de kèhù láizì měiguó 。
examples.english: Our company's customers are from the United States.

examples.chinese: 我的这个想法来自生活。
examples.pinyin: wǒde zhègè xiǎngfǎ láizì shēnghuó 。
examples.english: My idea comes from life.

examples.chinese: 这是来自政府的报告。
examples.pinyin: zhè shì láizì zhèngfǔ de bàogào 。
examples.english: This is a report from the government.

title: Using 'lai' as a dummy verb
explanation: Using 'lai' as a dummy verb. Used for addressing people.

examples.chinese: 我来吧。
examples.pinyin: wǒ lái ba 。
examples.english: Let me do it.

examples.chinese: 让他自己来。
examples.pinyin: ràng tā zìjǐ lái 。
examples.english: Let him come by himself.

examples.chinese: 还是你们自己来吧。
examples.pinyin: huánshì nǐmen zìjǐ lái ba 。
examples.english: Come on your own.

examples.chinese: 你写得好看，你来吧。
examples.pinyin: nǐ xiě dé hǎokàn ，nǐ lái ba 。
examples.english: You write beautifully, come on.

examples.chinese: 谁能读一下这段话？
examples.pinyin: shúi néng dú yī xià zhè duàn huà ？
examples.english: Who can read this passage?

title: Expressing 'don't need to' with 'buyong'
explanation: Expressing 'don't need to' with 'buyong'. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 不用谢。
examples.pinyin: bùyòng xiè 。
examples.english: you are welcome.

examples.chinese: 不用担心。
examples.pinyin: bùyòng dànxīn 。
examples.english: do not worry.

examples.chinese: 孩子不用买票。
examples.pinyin: háizǐ bùyòng mǎi piào 。
examples.english: Children do not need to buy tickets.

examples.chinese: 你不用过去，她会过来的。
examples.pinyin: nǐ bùyòng guòqù ，tā hùi guòlái de 。
examples.english: You do n’t have to go, she will come.

examples.chinese: 今天不用加班。
examples.pinyin: jīntiān bùyòng jiābān 。
examples.english: No overtime work today.

title: Expressing 'must' with 'dei'
explanation: Expressing 'must' with 'dei'. Used for giving commands, expressing obligations.

examples.chinese: 我们得走了。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen dé zǒu le 。
examples.english: We have to go.

examples.chinese: 时间不早了，我得回家了。
examples.pinyin: shíjiān bù zǎo le，wǒ dé húijiā le 。
examples.english: It's getting late, I have to go home.

examples.chinese: 他是你弟弟，你得帮他。
examples.pinyin: tā shì nǐ dìdì ，nǐ dé bāng tā 。
examples.english: He is your brother, you have to help him.

examples.chinese: 不好意思，你得马上离开。
examples.pinyin: bùhǎoyìsī ，nǐ dé mǎshàng líkāi 。
examples.english: Sorry, you have to leave immediately.

examples.chinese: 在学校就得听老师的话。
examples.pinyin: zài xuéxiào jìu dé tīng lǎoshī de huà 。
examples.english: You have to listen to the teacher at school.

title: Combining verbs with 'bing'
structure: Verb / [Verb Phrase 1] + 并(且) + Verb / [Verb Phrase 2]
explanation: Combining verbs with 'bing'

examples.chinese: 爸爸批评了我并且告诉我以后不能说谎。
examples.pinyin: bàbà pīpíng le wǒ bìngqiě gàosù wǒ yǐhòu bù néng shuōhuǎng 。
examples.english: Dad criticized me and told me not to lie in the future.

examples.chinese: 我们需要的是有丰富的工作经验并且懂得团队合作的员工。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen xūyào de shì yǒu fēngfù de gōngzuò jīngyàn bìngqiě dǒng dé tuándùi hézuò de yuángōng 。
examples.english: What we need is employees who have rich work experience and understand teamwork.

examples.chinese: 你要按照我说的做并且要做好。
examples.pinyin: nǐ yào ànzhào wǒ shuō de zuò bìngqiě yào zuò hǎo 。
examples.english: You have to do what I said and do well.

examples.chinese: 我通知了所有的人，并且准备了所有的材料。
examples.pinyin: wǒ tōngzhī le suǒyǒu de rén，bìngqiě zhǔnbèi le suǒyǒu de cáiliào 。
examples.english: I notified all the people and prepared all the materials.

examples.chinese: 这种现象很常见并且会持续很长时间。
examples.pinyin: zhèzhǒng xiànxiàng hěn chángjiàn bìngqiě hùi chíxù hěn cháng shíjiān 。
examples.english: This phenomenon is very common and will last a long time.

title: Doing something less with 'shao'
explanation: Doing something less with 'shao'. Used for adding more explanation.

examples.chinese: 请少放点盐。
examples.pinyin: qǐng shǎo fàng diǎn yán 。
examples.english: Please put less salt.

examples.chinese: 少吃垃圾食品。
examples.pinyin: shǎo chī lājí shípǐn 。
examples.english: eat less junk food.

examples.chinese: 少买点，吃不完会坏的。
examples.pinyin: shǎo mǎi diǎn ，chī bù wán hùi huài de 。
examples.english: Buy less and it will be bad if you do n’t finish it.

examples.chinese: 你能不能少抽点烟？
examples.pinyin: nǐ néng bù néng shǎo chōu diǎn yān ？
examples.english: Can you smoke less?

examples.chinese: 快期中考试了，少玩点游戏吧。
examples.pinyin: kuài qīzhōng kǎoshì le ，shǎo wán diǎn yóuxì ba 。
examples.english: The exam is about to start, so do n’t play games.

title: Doing something more with 'duo'
explanation: Doing something more with 'duo'. Used for adding more explanation.

examples.chinese: 多吃点。
examples.pinyin: duō chī diǎn 。
examples.english: eat more.

examples.chinese: 多放点辣。
examples.pinyin: duō fàng diǎn là 。
examples.english: More spicy.

examples.chinese: 多拿一点。
examples.pinyin: duō ná yīdiǎn 。
examples.english: Get more.

examples.chinese: 爷爷，你要多出去走走。
examples.pinyin: yéyé ，nǐ yào duō chūqù zǒuzǒu 。
examples.english: Grandpa, you have to go out more.

examples.chinese: 多给他点时间吧。
examples.pinyin: duō gěi tā diǎn shíjiān ba 。
examples.english: Give him more time.

title: Emphasizing the doer of an action with 'you'
explanation: Emphasizing the doer of an action with 'you'. Used for indicating conditions, describing people, emphasizing.

examples.chinese: 这件事由我负责。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì yóu wǒ fùzé 。
examples.english: I am responsible for this matter.

examples.chinese: 这是由他决定的，你就别干涉了。
examples.pinyin: zhè shì yóu tā juédìng de，nǐ jìubié gānshè le 。
examples.english: This is up to him, so do n’t interfere.

examples.chinese: 太悲剧了，会议由王总主持，肯定会很无聊！
examples.pinyin: tài bēijù le，hùiyì yóu wángzǒng zhǔchí，kěndìng hùi hěn wúliáo！
examples.english: It's too tragic, the meeting was chaired by President Wang, and it will definitely be boring!

title: Expressing 'never' with 'conglai'
explanation: Expressing 'never' with 'conglai'. Used for referring to habitual actions, referring to the past, expressing frequency.

examples.chinese: 她从来不喝酒。
examples.pinyin: tā cónglái bù hējǐu 。
examples.english: She never drinks alcohol.

examples.chinese: 我女朋友从不给我打电话。
examples.pinyin: wǒ nv̌péngyǒu cóng bù gěi wǒ dǎ diànhuà 。
examples.english: My girlfriend never calls me.

examples.chinese: 这个人很奇怪，他从来不笑。
examples.pinyin: zhè gè rén hěn qíguài，tā cónglái bù xiào 。
examples.english: This man is very strange, he never laughs.

examples.chinese: 你父母从来不打你吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐ fùmǔ cónglái bù dǎ nǐ ma ？
examples.english: Do your parents never beat you?

examples.chinese: 他从不关心别人。
examples.pinyin: tā cóng bù guānxīn biérén 。
examples.english: He never cared about others.

title: Expressing 'to be worth' doing with 'zhide'
structure: 值得 + Verb / [Verb Phrase]  /  ([Verb Phrase]) + 值得
explanation: Expressing 'to be worth' doing with 'zhide'. Used for expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 雷锋助人为乐的精神值得我们学习。
examples.pinyin: léifēng zhùrénwèilè de jīngshén zhídé wǒmen xuéxí 。
examples.english: Lei Feng's spirit of helping others is worth learning.

examples.chinese: 巴金的散文很值得一看。
examples.pinyin: bājīn de sànwén hěn zhídé yīkàn 。
examples.english: Ba Jin's prose is worth reading.

examples.chinese: 这件小事不值得你担心。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn xiǎoshì bù zhídé nǐ dànxīn 。
examples.english: This little thing is not worth worrying about.

examples.chinese: 值得吗？
examples.pinyin: zhídéma ？
examples.english: does it worth?

examples.chinese: 上大学(很)值得。
examples.pinyin: shàngdàxué(hěn)zhídé 。
examples.english: It is (very) worth going to college.

title: Expressing 'until' with 'dao'
structure: Verb (+ 一直) + 到 + Time / Event
explanation: Expressing 'until' with 'dao'. Used for describing actions, expressing result.

examples.chinese: 你们要玩到几点？
examples.pinyin: nǐmen yào wán dào jī diǎn ？
examples.english: What time do you want to play?

examples.chinese: 我们在酒吧一直聊到半夜。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen zài jǐuba yīzhí liáo dào bànyè 。
examples.english: We chatted in the bar until midnight.

examples.chinese: 你弟弟要在我们家住到什么时候？
examples.pinyin: nǐ dìdì yào zài wǒmen jiā zhù dào shíyāo shíhòu ？
examples.english: When will your brother live in our house?

examples.chinese: 昨天的会一直开到晚上九点。
examples.pinyin: zuótiān de hùi yīzhí kāi dào wǎnshàng jǐudiǎn 。
examples.english: Yesterday's meeting was held until nine o'clock in the evening.

examples.chinese: 我邻居今天吵架了，一直吵到警察过来。
examples.pinyin: wǒ línjū jīntiān chǎojià le ，yīzhí chǎo dào jǐngchá guòlái 。
examples.english: My neighbor quarreled today until the police came.

title: Indicating negative impact with 'haide'
explanation: Indicating negative impact with 'haide'. Used for complaining.

examples.chinese: 下午喝了两杯咖啡，害得我晚上睡不着。
examples.pinyin: xiàwǔ hē le liǎng bēi kāfēi，hàidé wǒ wǎnshàng shùi bù zháo 。
examples.english: I drank two cups of coffee in the afternoon, which prevented me from sleeping at night.

examples.chinese: 外面太吵了，害得我们没办法专心工作。
examples.pinyin: wàimiàn tài chǎo le，hàidé wǒmen méi bànfǎ zhuānxīn gōngzuò 。
examples.english: It's too noisy outside, which prevents us from concentrating on work.

examples.chinese: 你昨晚没回来，电话也打不通，害得我担心了一个晚上。
examples.pinyin: nǐ zuówǎn méi húilái，diànhuà yě dǎ bùtōng，hàidé wǒ dànxīn le yī gè wǎnshàng 。
examples.english: You did n’t come back last night, and the phone could n’t get through, which made me worry all night.

examples.chinese: 他把我的手机拿走了，也不跟我说一下，害得我找了半天。
examples.pinyin: tā bǎ wǒ de shǒujī ná zǒu le，yě bù gēn wǒ shuō yīxià，hàidé wǒ zhǎo le bàntiān 。
examples.english: He took my phone away and didn't tell me about it, which made me look for a long time.

examples.chinese: 我的护照丢了，害得我现在哪里也去不了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ de hùzhào dīu le，hàidé wǒ xiànzài nǎlǐ yě qù bùle 。
examples.english: I lost my passport, so I can't go anywhere now.

title: Separable verb
explanation: Separable verb. Used for describing actions, referring to the present, referring to the past, referring to past experiences, referring to changes of situation.

examples.chinese: 我没有时间见面。
examples.pinyin: wǒ méiyǒu shíjiān jiànmiàn 。
examples.english: I don't have time to meet.

examples.chinese: 我没有时间见你。
examples.pinyin: wǒ méiyǒu shíjiān jiàn nǐ 。
examples.english: I don't have time to see you.

examples.chinese: 我明天跟他见面。
examples.pinyin: wǒ míngtiān gēn tā jiànmiàn 。
examples.english: I will meet him tomorrow.

examples.chinese: 我不要跟她结婚。
examples.pinyin: wǒ bùyào gēn tā jiéhūn 。
examples.english: I don't want to marry her.

examples.chinese: 你还没有跟我道歉。
examples.pinyin: nǐ huán méiyǒu gēn wǒ dàoqiàn 。
examples.english: You have not apologized to me.

title: Using 'zhe' when 'verbing away'
structure: Verb + 着 + Verb + 着 + 就 + Comment + 了
explanation: Using 'zhe' when 'verbing away'. Used for describing actions, expressing movement, indicating conditions, expressing duration.

examples.chinese: 说着说着我就发现自己也糊涂了。
examples.pinyin: shuōzháo shuōzháo wǒ jìu fāxiàn zìjǐ yě hútú le 。
examples.english: Talking about it, I found myself confused.

examples.chinese: 我今天一直都在看语法的书，看着看着，就睡着了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ jīntiān yīzhí dū zài kàn yǔfǎ de shū， kànzháo kànzháo，jìu shùizháo le 。
examples.english: I've been reading grammar books all the time today, looked at it and fell asleep

examples.chinese: 我在北京的胡同里走着走着就走丢了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ zài běijīng de hútóng lǐ zǒu zháo zǒu zháo jìu zǒudīu le 。
examples.english: I walked and lost in the alleys of Beijing.

title: Expressing 'although' with 'jinguan'
structure: 尽管⋯⋯ ，但是 + Subj. + 还是⋯⋯
explanation: Expressing 'although' with 'jinguan'. Used for contrasting, connecting ideas.

examples.chinese: 尽管老板最近不在，我们还是不能偷懒。
examples.pinyin: jǐnguǎn lǎobǎn zùijìn bùzài ，wǒmen huánshì bù néng tōulǎn 。
examples.english: Despite the absence of the boss recently, we can't be lazy.

examples.chinese: 尽管我很生气，但是我没发脾气。
examples.pinyin: jǐnguǎn wǒ hěn shēngqì ，dànshì wǒ méi fāpíqì 。
examples.english: Although I was angry, I didn't lose my temper.

examples.chinese: 尽管警察已经找到了一些证据，但是他们还是不能抓那个嫌疑人。
examples.pinyin: jǐnguǎn jǐngchá yǐjīng zhǎodào le yīxiē zhèngjù ，dànshì tāmen huánshì bùnéng zhuā nàgè xiányírén 。
examples.english: Although the police had found some evidence, they could not arrest the suspect.

examples.chinese: 尽管他的书很有争议，但它还是出版了。
examples.pinyin: jǐnguǎn tā de shū hěn yǒu zhēngyì ，dàn tā huánshì chūbǎn le 。
examples.english: Although his book is controversial, it is still published.

examples.chinese: 尽管困难很多，但是我们不能放弃。
examples.pinyin: jǐnguǎn kùnnán hěnduō ，dànshì wǒmen bùnéng fàngqì 。
examples.english: Despite the difficulties, we cannot give up.

title: Expressing contrariness with 'dao'
explanation: Expressing contrariness with 'dao'. Used for contrasting.

examples.chinese: 他不是很努力，成绩倒也不错。
examples.pinyin: tā bù shì hěn nǔlì ，chéngjī dǎo yě bùcuò 。
examples.english: He didn't work very hard, and his grades were not bad.

examples.chinese: 已经是春天了，倒又冷起来了。
examples.pinyin: yǐjīng shì chūntiān le，dǎo yòu lěng qǐlái le 。
examples.english: It was already spring and it was cold again.

examples.chinese: 不吃药，病倒慢慢好了。
examples.pinyin: bù chī yào ，bìng dǎo mànmàn hǎo le 。
examples.english: Without medicine, he fell ill slowly.

examples.chinese: 英语不是他的母语，他说得倒挺地道的。
examples.pinyin: yīngyǔ bù shì tā de mǔyǔ ，tā shuō dé dǎo tǐng dìdào de 。
examples.english: English is not his mother tongue, he speaks quite authentically.
