examples.pinyin: zhè piān wénzhāng de nèiróng dǎo bùcuò ，jìushì tài cháng le 。
examples.english: The content of this article is pretty good, it is too long.

title: The 'however' adverb 'que'
explanation: The 'however' adverb 'que'. Used for contrasting, differentiating.

examples.chinese: 我是你最好的朋友，你却没邀请我。
examples.pinyin: wǒ shì nǐ zùihǎo de péngyǒu ，nǐ què méi yāoqǐng wǒ 。
examples.english: I am your best friend, but you did not invite me.

examples.chinese: 我是你最好的朋友，但是你却没邀请我。
examples.pinyin: wǒ shì nǐ zùihǎo de péngyǒu ，dànshì nǐ què méi yāoqǐng wǒ 。
examples.english: I am your best friend, but you did not invite me.

examples.chinese: 他家很有钱，他却从来不炫耀。
examples.pinyin: tā jiā hěn yǒuqián ，tā què cónglái bù xuànyào 。
examples.english: His family is rich, but he never shows off.

examples.chinese: 他家很有钱，但是他却从来不炫耀。
examples.pinyin: tā jiā hěn yǒuqián ，dànshì tā què cónglái bù xuànyào 。
examples.english: His family is rich, but he never shows off.

examples.chinese: 他是老板，却没有人听他的。
examples.pinyin: tā shì lǎobǎn ，què méiyǒu rén tīng tā de 。
examples.english: He is the boss, but no one listens to him.

title: Expressing 'due to…' with 'youyu'
explanation: Expressing 'due to…' with 'youyu'. Used for indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 由于温室效应的影响，全球的气候变得越来越反常了。
examples.pinyin: yóuyú wēnshìxiàoyìng de yǐngxiǎng，quánqíu de qìhòu biàndé yuè lái yuè fǎncháng le 。
examples.english: Due to the influence of the greenhouse effect, the global climate has become more and more abnormal.

examples.chinese: 由于意见不一致，两位老板吵了起来。
examples.pinyin: yóuyú yìjiàn bùyīzhì，liǎngwèi lǎobǎn chǎoleqǐlái 。
examples.english: The two bosses quarreled because of disagreement.

examples.chinese: 由于公司发展的需要，我们打算再招聘一些新的老师。
examples.pinyin: yóuyú gōngsī fāzhǎn de xūyào，wǒmen dǎsuàn zài zhāopìn yīxiē xīnde lǎoshī 。
examples.english: Due to the development of the company, we plan to recruit some new teachers.

examples.chinese: 由于目标客户的变化，企业的营销策略需要做出一些调整。
examples.pinyin: yóuyú mùbiāokèhù de biànhuà，qǐyè de yíngxiāo cèlvè xūyào zuòchū yīxiē diàozhěng 。
examples.english: Due to changes in target customers, the company's marketing strategy needs to be adjusted.

examples.chinese: 由于人口的快速增加，大城市的社会问题越来越严重。
examples.pinyin: yóuyúrénkǒu de kuàisù zēngjiā，dàchéngshì de shèhùiwèntí yuèláiyuè yánzhòng 。
examples.english: Due to the rapid increase in population, the social problems in large cities are becoming more and more serious.

title: Expressing 'since' with 'jiran'
structure: 既然＋Fact, 那 / 就 / 那就＋Suggestion / Inference  /  既然 + Fact, （那 +）rhetorical question
explanation: Expressing 'since' with 'jiran'. Used for indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 你既然不想说，那就别说了。
examples.pinyin: nǐ jìrán bù xiǎng shuō，nàjìu bié shuō le 。
examples.english: Since you don't want to say it, don't say it.

examples.chinese: 既然你那么喜欢，那就买吧。
examples.pinyin: jìrán nǐ nàyāo xǐhuān，nàjìu mǎi ba 。
examples.english: Since you like it so much, buy it.

examples.chinese: 她既然刚刚分手，那现在应该是单身吧。
examples.pinyin: tā jìrán gānggāng fēnshǒu，nà xiànzài yìnggāi shì dānshēn ba 。
examples.english: Since she just broke up, she should be single now.

examples.chinese: 既然你们是好朋友，那他肯定会帮你吧。
examples.pinyin: jìrán nǐmen shì hǎo péngyǒu，nà tā kěndìng hùi bāng nǐ ba 。
examples.english: Since you are good friends, he will definitely help you.

examples.chinese: 既然大家都不感兴趣，就换个话题吧。
examples.pinyin: jìrán dàjiā dū bù gǎn xīngqù，jìu huàn gè huàtí ba 。
examples.english: Since everyone is not interested, just change the subject.

title: Expressing 'therefore' with 'yinci'
explanation: Expressing 'therefore' with 'yinci'. Used for indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 她在农村长大，因此很了解农民的生活。
examples.pinyin: tā zài nóngcūn chángdà， yīncǐ hěn lejiě nóngmín de shēnghuó 。
examples.english: She grew up in the countryside, so she knows the farmer's life well.

examples.chinese: 工厂已经停产很久了，因此无法给工人发工资。
examples.pinyin: gōngchǎng yǐjīng tíngchǎn hěn jǐu le， yīncǐ wúfǎ gěi gōngrén fā gōngzī 。
examples.english: The factory has been shut down for a long time, so it is impossible to pay workers.

examples.chinese: 韩寒的文笔好，因此他写的小说很受欢迎。
examples.pinyin: hánhán de wénbǐ hǎo， yīncǐ tā xiě de xiǎoshuō hěn shòu huānyíng 。
examples.english: Han Han's writing is good, so his novels are very popular.

title: Advanced uses of direction complement '-qilai'
structure: Verb + 起来  /  Subj. + 把 + Obj. + Verb + 起来
explanation: Advanced uses of direction complement '-qilai'. Used for expressing result.

examples.chinese: 13和15加起来是多少？
examples.pinyin: 13 hé 15 jiā qǐlái shì duōshǎo ？
examples.english: What is the sum of 13 and 15?

examples.chinese: 他把衣服都收起来了。
examples.pinyin: tā bǎ yīfú dū shōu qǐlái le 。
examples.english: He put away his clothes.

examples.chinese: 我老婆把钱都存起来了。
examples.pinyin: wǒ lǎopó bǎ qián dū cún qǐlái le 。
examples.english: My wife saved all the money.

examples.chinese: 把你的玩具都收起来。
examples.pinyin: bǎ nǐ de wánjù dū shōu qǐlái 。
examples.english: Put away all your toys.

examples.chinese: 你为什么要把我的手机藏起来？
examples.pinyin: nǐ wèishíyāo yào bǎ wǒ de shǒujī cáng qǐlái ？
examples.english: Why are you hiding my phone?

title: Direction complement
explanation: Direction complement. Used for describing actions, expressing movement, describing places.

examples.chinese: 我在楼上，你上来。
examples.pinyin: wǒ zài lóushàng ，nǐ shànglái 。
examples.english: I'm upstairs, you come up.

examples.chinese: 你在楼上等我一下。
examples.pinyin: nǐ zài lóushàng děng wǒ yīxià 。
examples.english: You are waiting for me upstairs.

examples.chinese: 出来玩吧，我们在酒吧等你。
examples.pinyin: chūlái wán ba ，wǒmen zài jǐuba děng nǐ 。
examples.english: Come out to play, we are waiting for you at the bar.

examples.chinese: 我妈不让我出去。
examples.pinyin: wǒ mā bù ràng wǒ chūqù 。
examples.english: My mom won't let me go out.

examples.chinese: 这是我家，进来吧，随便坐。
examples.pinyin: zhè shì wǒjiā ，jìnlái ba ，súibiàn zuò 。
examples.english: This is my home. Come in and sit casually.

title: Direction complement '-qilai'
explanation: Direction complement '-qilai'. Used for describing actions, expressing movement, expressing result.

examples.chinese: 请大家站起来。
examples.pinyin: qǐng dàjiā zhàn qǐlái 。
examples.english: Please stand up.

examples.chinese: 捡起来。
examples.pinyin: jiǎn qǐlái 。
examples.english: pick it up.

examples.chinese: 头抬起来。
examples.pinyin: tóu tái qǐlái 。
examples.english: Head up.

examples.chinese: 别动！把手举起来。
examples.pinyin: biédòng ！bǎ shǒu jǔ qǐlái 。
examples.english: do not move! Raise your hand.

examples.chinese: 小鸟飞起来了。
examples.pinyin: xiǎoniǎo fēi qǐlái le 。
examples.english: The bird flew up.

title: Potential complement
structure: Subj. + Verb + 不 / 得 + Complement
explanation: Potential complement. Used for describing actions.

examples.chinese: 你没戴眼镜，看得清楚吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐ méi dài yǎnjìng ，kàn dé qīngchǔ ma ？
examples.english: You do n’t wear glasses, can you see clearly?

examples.chinese: 他这么粗心，做得好吗？
examples.pinyin: tā zhèyāo cūxīn ，zuò dé hǎo ma ？
examples.english: He is so careless, is he doing well?

examples.chinese: 你这么聪明，肯定学得会。
examples.pinyin: nǐ zhèyāo cōngmíng ，kěndìng xué dé hùi 。
examples.english: If you are so smart, you will definitely learn it.

examples.chinese: 早上五点出发，孩子们起得来吗？
examples.pinyin: zǎoshàng wǔdiǎn chūfā ，háizǐmen qǐ dé lái ma ？
examples.english: Will the children get up at five in the morning?

examples.chinese: 这么高的山，你爬得上去吗？
examples.pinyin: zhèyāo gāo de shān ，nǐ pá dé shàngqù ma ？
examples.english: Can you climb such a high mountain?

title: Expressing 'as long as' with 'zhiyao'
explanation: Expressing 'as long as' with 'zhiyao'. Used for indicating conditions, indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 只要你真的喜欢，我就给你买。
examples.pinyin: zhǐyào nǐ zhēnde xǐhuān， wǒ jìu gěi nǐ mǎi 。
examples.english: As long as you really like it, I will buy it for you.

examples.chinese: 只要你努力学习，就会有进步。
examples.pinyin: zhǐyào nǐ nǔlì xuéxí， jìu hùi yǒu jìnbù 。
examples.english: As long as you study hard, there will be progress.

examples.chinese: 只要有你在，我就放心了。
examples.pinyin: zhǐyào yǒu nǐ zài， wǒ jìu fàngxīn le 。
examples.english: As long as you are there, I can rest assured.

examples.chinese: 只要下雨，她就会心情不好。
examples.pinyin: zhǐyào xiàyǔ， tā jìu hùi xīnqíng bù hǎo 。
examples.english: As long as it rains, she will be in a bad mood.

examples.chinese: 只要看到妈妈，宝宝就不哭了。
examples.pinyin: zhǐyào kàndào māmā， bǎobǎo jìu bù kū le 。
examples.english: As long as you see your mother, your baby will not cry.

title: Expressing 'unless' with 'chufei'
explanation: Expressing 'unless' with 'chufei'. Used for indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 我不去，除非你也去。
examples.pinyin: wǒ bù qù ，chúfēi nǐ yě qù 。
examples.english: I will not go unless you go too.

examples.chinese: 你不能进，除非你有预约。
examples.pinyin: nǐ bùnéng jìn ，chúfēi nǐ yǒu yùyuē 。
examples.english: You cannot enter unless you have an appointment.

examples.chinese: 我不说，除非你答应我你不会生气。
examples.pinyin: wǒ bù shuō ，chúfēi nǐ dáyìng wǒ nǐ bùhùi shēngqì 。
examples.english: I will not say that unless you promise me you will not be angry.

examples.chinese: 你不会这么快升职，除非你表现很好。
examples.pinyin: nǐ bù hùi zhèyāo kuài shēngzhí ，chúfēi nǐ biǎoxiàn hěn hǎo 。
examples.english: You won't get promoted so quickly unless you perform well.

examples.chinese: 我们公司一般不允许员工请假，除非理由很充分。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen gōngsī yībān bù yǔnxǔ yuángōng qǐngjiǎ ，chúfēi lǐyóu hěn chōngfēn 。
examples.english: Our company generally does not allow employees to take leave, unless the reasons are good.

title: Expressing 'even if…' with 'jishi'
explanation: Expressing 'even if…' with 'jishi'. Used for indicating conditions, expressing determination.

examples.chinese: 即使他没钱，我也要嫁给他。
examples.pinyin: jíshǐ tā méiqián ，wǒ yě yào jiàgěi tā 。
examples.english: Even if he has no money, I will marry him.

examples.chinese: 即使你很有钱，也买不到幸福。
examples.pinyin: jíshǐ nǐ hěn yǒuqián ，yě mǎibùdào xìngfú 。
examples.english: Even if you are rich, you can't buy happiness.

examples.chinese: 即使你没胃口，也要吃一点。
examples.pinyin: jíshǐ nǐ méiwèikǒu ，yě yào chī yīdiǎn 。
examples.english: Even if you have no appetite, eat a little.

examples.chinese: 即使你对这门课不太感兴趣，也要学。
examples.pinyin: jíshǐ nǐ dùi zhè mén kè bùtài gǎnxīngqù ，yě yào xué 。
examples.english: Even if you are not very interested in this course, you still have to learn it.

examples.chinese: 即使她整容，我也能认出她。
examples.pinyin: jíshǐ tā zhěngróng ，wǒ yě néng rènchū tā 。
examples.english: Even if she had a plastic surgery, I could recognize her.

title: Expressing 'if… then…' with 'yaoshi'
explanation: Expressing 'if… then…' with 'yaoshi'. Used for indicating conditions, indicating cause and effect, expressing possibility.

examples.chinese: 你要是真想我，就给我打电话。
examples.pinyin: nǐ yàoshì zhēn xiǎng wǒ ，jìu gěi wǒ dǎ diànhuà 。
examples.english: If you really miss me, call me.

examples.chinese: 要是我妈知道这件事，我就死定了!
examples.pinyin: yàoshì wǒmā zhīdào zhè jiàn shì ，wǒ jìu sǐ dìngle !
examples.english: If my mother knew about it, I would be dead!

examples.chinese: 要是老板不同意，我们就不能跟客户签合同。
examples.pinyin: yàoshì lǎobǎn bù tóngyì，wǒmen jìu bù néng gēn kèhù qiān hétóng 。
examples.english: If the boss doesn't agree, we can't sign a contract with the customer.

examples.chinese: 你要再说，我真生气了。
examples.pinyin: nǐ yào zài shuō ，wǒ zhēn shēngqì le 。
examples.english: You have to say it again, I am really angry.

examples.chinese: 他要不听，我也没办法。
examples.pinyin: tā yào bù tīng ，wǒ yě méi bànfǎ 。
examples.english: If he doesn't listen, I can't help it.

title: Expressing 'no matter' with 'buguan'
explanation: Expressing 'no matter' with 'buguan'. Used for indicating conditions, expressing attitude, expressing determination.

examples.chinese: 不管你穿什么都好看。
examples.pinyin: bùguǎn nǐ chuān shíyāo dū hǎokàn 。
examples.english: It looks good no matter what you wear.

examples.chinese: 不管怎么样，我们都要好好准备。
examples.pinyin: bùguǎn zěnyāoyáng ，wǒmen dū yào hǎohǎo zhǔnbèi 。
examples.english: Either way, we must be well prepared.

examples.chinese: 不管你在哪儿工作，都要交税。
examples.pinyin: bùguǎn nǐ zài nǎér gōngzuò ，dū yào jiāoshùi 。
examples.english: No matter where you work, you have to pay taxes.

examples.chinese: 不管别人怎么想，你都要坚持。
examples.pinyin: bùguǎn biérén zěnyāo xiǎng ，nǐ dū yào jiānchí 。
examples.english: No matter what other people think, you must insist.

examples.chinese: 不管你是什么时候买的，我们都可以免费修。
examples.pinyin: bùguǎn nǐ shì shíyāo shíhòu mǎi de ，wǒmen dū kěyǐ miǎnfèi xīu 。
examples.english: No matter when you bought it, we can repair it for free.

title: Expressing 'no matter' with 'wulun'
structure: 无论 + Circumstances + 都 / 也 + Inevitable Result
explanation: Expressing 'no matter' with 'wulun'. Used for indicating conditions, expressing attitude, expressing determination.

examples.chinese: 无论怎么样，他都会放弃，别高估他。
examples.pinyin: wúlùn zěnyāoyáng，tā dū hùi fàngqì，bié gāogū tā 。
examples.english: No matter what, he will give up, don't overestimate him.

examples.chinese: 无论多么成功，他总觉得自己不够好。
examples.pinyin: wúlùn duōyāo chénggōng，tā zǒng juédé zìjǐ bùgòu hǎo 。
examples.english: No matter how successful, he always feels that he is not good enough.

examples.chinese: 无论你到哪儿我都会跟着你。
examples.pinyin: wúlùn nǐ dào nǎér wǒ dū hùi gēnzháo nǐ 。
examples.english: I will follow you wherever you go.

examples.chinese: 无论你说还是不说，结果都一样。
examples.pinyin: wúlùn nǐ shuō huánshì bù shuō，jiéguǒ dū yīyáng 。
examples.english: Whether you say it or not, the result is the same.

title: Expressing 'all' with 'suoyou'
explanation: Expressing 'all' with 'suoyou'. Used for expressing quantity.

examples.chinese: 你买了她所有的书？
examples.pinyin: nǐ mǎi le tā suǒyǒu de shū ？
examples.english: Did you buy all her books?

examples.chinese: 我喜欢所有我妈妈做的菜。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuān suǒyǒu wǒ māmā zuò de cài 。
examples.english: I like all the dishes my mother makes.

examples.chinese: 他记得所有朋友的生日。
examples.pinyin: tā jìdé suǒyǒu péngyǒu de shēngrì 。
examples.english: He remembers the birthdays of all his friends.

examples.chinese: 我的孩子看过所有的迪斯尼动画片。
examples.pinyin: wǒ de háizǐ kàn guò suǒyǒu de dísīní dònghuàpiàn 。
examples.english: My child has seen all Disney cartoons.

examples.chinese: 所有人都走了吗？
examples.pinyin: suǒyǒu rén dū zǒu le ma ？
examples.english: Has everyone gone?

title: Expressing 'one of' with 'zhiyi'
structure: Subj. + 是 + [Noun Phrase] + 之一  /  [Noun Phrase] + 之一 + 是 ⋯⋯
explanation: Expressing 'one of' with 'zhiyi'

examples.chinese: 她是我最好的朋友之一。
examples.pinyin: tā shì wǒ zùi hǎo de péngyǒu zhī yī 。
examples.english: She is one of my best friends.

examples.chinese: Frozen是我最喜欢的迪斯尼电影之一。
examples.pinyin: Frozen shì wǒ zùi xǐhuān de dísīní diànyǐng zhī yī 。
examples.english: Frozen is one of my favorite Disney movies.

examples.chinese: 纽约是世界上最国际化的城市之一。
examples.pinyin: nǐuyuē shì shìjiè shàng zùi guójìhuà de chéngshì zhī yī 。
examples.english: New York is one of the most international cities in the world.

examples.chinese: 他是这个公司的创始人之一。
examples.pinyin: tā shì zhègè gōngsī de chuàngshǐrén zhī yī 。
examples.english: He is one of the founders of this company.

examples.chinese: 成龙是最有名的中国明星之一。
examples.pinyin: chénglóng shì zùi yǒumíng de zhōngguó míngxīng zhī yī 。
examples.english: Jackie Chan is one of the most famous Chinese stars.

title: Expressing 'the other' with 'lingwai'
explanation: Expressing 'the other' with 'lingwai'

examples.chinese: 我有两个手机，一个是小米，另一个是iPhone。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yǒu liǎng gè shǒujī ，yī gè shì xiǎomǐ ，lìng yī gè shì iPhone 。
examples.english: I have two phones, one is Xiaomi and the other is iPhone.

examples.chinese: 她有两套房子，一套自己住，另一套租给别人了。
examples.pinyin: tā yǒu liǎng tào fángzǐ ，yī tào zìjǐ zhù ，lìng yī tào zū gěi biérén le 。
examples.english: She has two houses, one to live on her own and the other to rent to others.

examples.chinese: 我买了三张票，一张是我的，另外两张是给朋友的。
examples.pinyin: wǒ mǎi le sān zhāng piào ，yī zhāng shì wǒde ，lìngwài liǎng zhāng shì gěi péngyǒu de 。
examples.english: I bought three tickets, one is mine and the other two are for friends.

examples.chinese: 这几本书我今天拿走，另外几本下次再拿。
examples.pinyin: zhè jī běn shū wǒ jīntiān názǒu ，lìngwài jī běn xià cì zài ná 。
examples.english: I took these books today, and I will take the other books next time.

examples.chinese: 这个蛋糕一半是你的，另一半是妹妹的。
examples.pinyin: zhègè dàngāo yībàn shì nǐ de ，lìng yībàn shì mèimèi de 。
examples.english: Half of this cake is yours, and the other half is your sister's.

title: Advanced uses of 'lian'
structure: 连 + Verb + 都 + 不 / 没 + Verb (，就 ⋯⋯)
explanation: Advanced uses of 'lian'. Used for adding more explanation, expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 朋友？这个人我连见都没见过。
examples.pinyin: péngyǒu ？zhègè rén wǒ lián jiàn dū méi jiàn guò 。
examples.english: friend? I have never seen this person before.

examples.chinese: 你怎么连问都不问就拿别人的东西？
examples.pinyin: nǐ zěnyāo lián wèn dū bù wèn jìu ná biérén de dōngxī ？
examples.english: Why don't you take someone else's things without asking?

examples.chinese: 他连说都不说就走了。
examples.pinyin: tā lián shuō dū bù shuō jìu zǒu le 。
examples.english: He left without even talking.

examples.chinese: 你们连尝都没尝就说不好吃？
examples.pinyin: nǐmen lián cháng dū méi cháng jìu shuō bù hǎochī ？
examples.english: You said it was not delicious even if you did n’t taste it?

examples.chinese: 两年前，他连一句中文都不会说。
examples.pinyin: liǎng nián qián，tā lián yī jù zhōngwén dū bù hùi shuō 。
examples.english: Two years ago, he couldn't even speak a sentence of Chinese.

title: Explaining purpose with 'wei... er...'
structure: Subj. (+ 不) + 为 + Goal + 而 + Efforts Made
explanation: Explaining purpose with 'wei... er...'. Used for expressing purpose.

examples.chinese: 很多中国父母为孩子而活。
examples.pinyin: hěnduōzhōngguófùmǔwèiháizǐérhuó 。
examples.english: Many Chinese parents live for their children.

examples.chinese: 我们为梦想而奋斗。
examples.pinyin: wǒmenwèimèngxiǎngérfèndǒu 。
examples.english: We fight for our dreams.

examples.chinese: 为我们的健康而多做锻炼。
examples.pinyin: wèiwǒmendejiànkāngérduōzuòduànliàn 。
examples.english: Do more exercise for our health.

examples.chinese: 你是为钱而工作吗？
examples.pinyin: nǐshìwèiqiánérgōngzuòma ？
examples.english: Are you working for money?

examples.chinese: 我是为朋友而做的这件事情。
examples.pinyin: wǒshìwèipéngyǒuérzuòdezhèjiànshìqíng 。
examples.english: I did this for a friend.

title: Expressing 'both… and…' with 'ji...you'
explanation: Expressing 'both… and…' with 'ji...you'. Used for describing things, giving alternatives.

examples.chinese: 他做事情既快又好。
examples.pinyin: tā zuò shìqíng jì kuài yòu hǎo 。
examples.english: He does things quickly and well.

examples.chinese: 这家银行的服务既热情又周到。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiā yínxíng de fúwùjì rèqíng yòuzhōudào 。
examples.english: The service of this bank is warm and attentive.

examples.chinese: 这个产品的设计既时尚又人性化。
examples.pinyin: zhègè chǎnpǐn de shèjì jì shíshàng yòu rénxìnghuà 。
examples.english: The design of this product is both stylish and user-friendly.

examples.chinese: 她既是我妈妈，也是我朋友。
examples.pinyin: tā jì shì wǒ māmā ，yě shì wǒ péngyǒu 。
examples.english: She is both my mother and my friend.

examples.chinese: 要求是你既要会说流利的中文，也要会说流利的英文。
examples.pinyin: yàoqíu shì nǐ jì yào hùi shuō líulì de zhōngwén ，yě yào hùi shuō líulì de yīngwén 。
examples.english: The requirement is that you must be able to speak fluent Chinese as well as English.

title: Expressing location with 'zai... shang / xia / li'
structure: 在 + Place  /  在 + Location+ 上 / 下 / 里 / 旁边  /  在 + Occasion + 上
explanation: Expressing location with 'zai... shang / xia / li'. Used for describing places, expressing location, giving directions.

examples.chinese: 在中国
examples.pinyin: zài zhōngguó
examples.english: in China

examples.chinese: 在美国
examples.pinyin: zài měiguó
examples.english: In the United States

examples.chinese: 在上海
examples.pinyin: zài shànghǎi
examples.english: in Shanghai

examples.chinese: 在纽约
examples.pinyin: zài nǐuyuē
examples.english: in New York

examples.chinese: 在桌子上。
examples.pinyin: zài zhuōzǐ shàng 。
examples.english: on the table.

title: Expressing 'even' with 'lian' and 'dou'
structure: 连 + Obj. + 都 (+ 不 / 没) + Verb
explanation: Expressing 'even' with 'lian' and 'dou'. Used for adding more explanation, expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 这个问题太简单了，连三岁小孩都知道。
examples.pinyin: zhègè wèntí tài jiǎndān le ，lián sānsùi xiǎohái dū zhīdào 。
examples.english: This question is too simple, even three-year-old children know.

examples.chinese: 这个汉字太难了，连我的中文老师都不认识。
examples.pinyin: zhègè hànzì tài nán le ，lián wǒ de zhōngwén lǎoshī dū bù rènshì 。
examples.english: This Chinese character is too difficult to understand even my Chinese teacher.

examples.chinese: 他很可怜，连他妈妈都不管他。
examples.pinyin: tā hěnkělián ，lián tā māmā dū bù guǎn tā 。
examples.english: He was pitiful, even his mother ignored him.

examples.chinese: 她什么都放辣，连汤都是辣的。
examples.pinyin: tā shíyāo dū fàng là ，lián tāng dū shì làde 。
examples.english: She spicy everything, even the soup is spicy.

examples.chinese: 你们算什么好朋友？
examples.pinyin: nǐmen suàn shíyāo hǎopéngyǒu ？
examples.english: What kind of friends are you?

title: Expressing 'every' with question words
explanation: Expressing 'every' with question words. Used for expressing quantity.

examples.chinese: 谁都喜欢美食。
examples.pinyin: shúi dū xǐhuān měishí 。
examples.english: Everyone likes food.

examples.chinese: 谁都可以进。
examples.pinyin: shúi dū kěyǐ jìn 。
examples.english: Anyone can enter.

examples.chinese: 谁都不相信他说的话。
examples.pinyin: shúi dū bù xiāngxìn tā shuō de huà 。
examples.english: No one believed what he said.

examples.chinese: 他的房间里哪儿都是脏衣服。
examples.pinyin: tā de fángjiān lǐ nǎér dū shì zāng yīfú 。
examples.english: Dirty clothes are everywhere in his room.

examples.chinese: 我太累了，哪儿都不想去。
examples.pinyin: wǒ tài lèi le，nǎér dū bù xiǎng qù 。
examples.english: I'm too tired to go anywhere.

title: Expressing 'multiples' with 'bei'
structure: A + 是 + B + 的 + Number + 倍  /  A + 比 + B + Adj. + Number + 倍
explanation: Expressing 'multiples' with 'bei'. Used for comparing, expressing quantity.

examples.chinese: 他现在的工资是两年前的四倍。
examples.pinyin: tā xiànzài de gōngzī shì liǎng nián qián de sì bèi 。
examples.english: His current salary is four times that of two years ago.

examples.chinese: 公司现在的规模是十年前的五倍。
examples.pinyin: gōngsī xiànzài de gūimó shì shí nián qián de wǔ bèi 。
examples.english: The company is now five times larger than it was ten years ago.

examples.chinese: 今年的产量是去年的两倍。
examples.pinyin: jīnnián de chǎnliàng shì qùnián de liǎng bèi 。
examples.english: This year's output is twice that of last year.

examples.chinese: 我家客厅比你家客厅大一倍。
examples.pinyin: wǒ jiā kètīng bǐ nǐ jiā kètīng dà yī bèi 。
examples.english: My living room is twice as big as yours.

examples.chinese: 这个15岁的男孩比一般的孩子重一倍。
examples.pinyin: zhègè 15 sùi de nánhái bǐ yībān de háizǐ zhòng yī bèi 。
examples.english: The 15-year-old boy is twice as heavy as the average child.

title: Expressing 'not at all' with 'yidianr ye bu'
structure: Subj. + 一点 + 也 / 都 + 不 + Adj. / [Verb Phrase]
explanation: Expressing 'not at all' with 'yidianr ye bu'. Used for denying and refusing.

examples.chinese: 那个问题一点儿也不难。
examples.pinyin: nàgè wèntí yīdiǎnér yě bù nán 。
examples.english: That question is not difficult at all.

examples.chinese: 这个菜一点都不好吃。
examples.pinyin: zhègè cài yīdiǎn dū bù hǎochī 。
examples.english: This dish is not tasty at all.

examples.chinese: 我同事一点都不幽默。
examples.pinyin: wǒ tóngshì yīdiǎn dū bù yōumò 。
examples.english: My colleague is not humorous at all.

examples.chinese: 这个笑话一点也不好笑。
examples.pinyin: zhègè xiàohuà yīdiǎn yě bù hǎoxiào 。
examples.english: This joke is not funny at all.

examples.chinese: 我一点也不喜欢奶酪。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yīdiǎn yě bù xǐhuān nǎilào 。
examples.english: I don't like cheese at all.

title: Expressing not knowing how to do something using 'hao'
structure: Subj. + 不知道 + [Verb Phrase] + 好
explanation: Expressing not knowing how to do something using 'hao'. Used for expressing quality, comprehending.

examples.chinese: 我真的不知道怎么办才好。
examples.pinyin: wǒ zhēnde bù zhīdào zěnyāo bàn cái hǎo 。
examples.english: I really don't know what to do.

examples.chinese: 我们都不知道说什么好。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen dū bù zhīdào shuō shíyāo hǎo 。
examples.english: We do n’t even know what to say.

examples.chinese: 这件事我不知道跟谁说好。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì wǒ bù zhīdào gēn shúi shuō hǎo 。
examples.english: I don't know who to tell me about this matter.

examples.chinese: 老板不知道怪谁好。
examples.pinyin: lǎobǎn bù zhīdào guài shúi hǎo 。
examples.english: The boss doesn't know who is blaming.

examples.chinese: 他的短信我不知道怎么回复好。
examples.pinyin: tā de duǎnxìn wǒ bù zhīdào zěnyāo húifù hǎo 。
examples.english: I don't know how to reply to his text message.

title: Phrases using 'laishuo'
structure: 对 + Person + 来说 ，⋯⋯  /  Word + 来说
explanation: Phrases using 'laishuo'. Used for describing attitude.

examples.chinese: 对我来说，中文不容易。
examples.pinyin: dùi wǒ láishuō ， zhōngwén bù róngyì 。
examples.english: For me, Chinese is not easy.

examples.chinese: 对你来说，家庭重要还是工作重要？
examples.pinyin: dùi nǐ láishuō ，jiātíng zhòngyào huánshì gōngzuò zhòngyào ？
examples.english: For you, is family important or work important?

examples.chinese: 对孩子来说，这个问题太复杂了。
examples.pinyin: dùi háizǐ láishuō ，zhègè wèntí tài fùzá le 。
examples.english: This problem is too complicated for children.

examples.chinese: 一般来说，私立学校都比较贵。
examples.pinyin: yībān láishuō ，sīlì xuéxiào dū bǐjiào gùi 。
examples.english: Generally speaking, private schools are more expensive.

examples.chinese: 一般来说，我们只要外国实习生。
examples.pinyin: yībān láishuō ，wǒmen zhǐ yào wàiguó shíxíshēng 。
examples.english: Generally speaking, we only need foreign interns.

title: Conceding a point with 'shi'
structure: Adj. + 是 + Adj. ， 但是 / 就是 ⋯⋯
explanation: Conceding a point with 'shi'

examples.chinese: 工作忙是忙，但是我很开心。
examples.pinyin: gōngzuò máng shì máng ，dànshì wǒ hěn kāixīn 。
examples.english: Busy work is busy, but I am very happy.

examples.chinese: 这件衣服好看是好看，但是不适合我。
examples.pinyin: zhè jiàn yīfú hǎokàn shì hǎokàn ， dànshì bù shìhé wǒ 。
examples.english: This dress looks good, but it doesn't suit me.

examples.chinese: 这里的环境好是好，但是交通不太方便。
examples.pinyin: zhèlǐ de huánjìng hǎo shì hǎo ，dànshì jiāotōng bùtài fāngbiàn 。
examples.english: The environment here is good, but the transportation is not convenient.

examples.chinese: 累是累，但是很值得。
examples.pinyin: lèi shì lèi ，dànshì hěn zhídé 。
examples.english: Tired is tired, but worth it.

examples.chinese: 难是难，但是我相信我能做到。
examples.pinyin: nán shì nán ，dànshì wǒ xiāngxìn wǒ néng zuòdào 。
examples.english: It's difficult, but I believe I can do it.

title: Events in quick succession with 'yi... jiu...'
explanation: Events in quick succession with 'yi... jiu...'. Used for indicating conditions, sequencing events in time, indicating cause and effect.

examples.chinese: 饿死了，我一下课就要去吃午饭。
examples.pinyin: è sǐle，wǒ yī xiàkè jìu yào qù chī wǔfàn 。
examples.english: Starved to death, I will go to lunch after class.

examples.chinese: 你能不能一下班就去接孩子？
examples.pinyin: nǐ néng bù néng yī xiàbān jìu qù jiē háizǐ ？
examples.english: Can you pick up your child after work?

examples.chinese: 妈妈一到家就去做饭了。
examples.pinyin: māmā yī dào jiā jìu qù zuòfàn le 。
examples.english: Mother went to cook as soon as she got home.

examples.chinese: 老师一来大家就不说话了。
examples.pinyin: lǎoshī yī lái dàjiā jìu bù shuōhuà le 。
examples.english: When the teacher came, everyone stopped talking.

examples.chinese: 我一进门，小狗就跑了过来。
examples.pinyin: wǒ yī jìnmén ，xiǎogǒu jìu pǎo le guòlái 。
examples.english: As soon as I entered, the puppy ran over.

title: Expressing various aspects with 'yi fangmian'
structure: 一 方面 ⋯⋯ ， (另) 一 方面 ⋯⋯
explanation: Expressing various aspects with 'yi fangmian'. Used for expressing quality.

examples.chinese: 自己做饭一方面健康，一方面还能省点钱。
examples.pinyin: zìjǐ zuòfàn yī fāngmiàn jiànkāng ，yī fāngmiàn huán néng shěng diǎn qián 。
examples.english: Cooking on your own is healthy while saving money.

examples.chinese: 他一方面想改变，一方面又害怕改变。
examples.pinyin: tā yī fāngmiàn xiǎng gǎibiàn ，yī fāngmiàn yòu hàipà gǎibiàn 。
examples.english: On the one hand, he wants to change, and on the other, he is afraid of change.

examples.chinese: 我们一方面不想这样做，一方面必须这样做。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen yī fāngmiàn bù xiǎng zhèyáng zuò ，yī fāngmiàn bìxū zhèyáng zuò 。
examples.english: On the one hand, we do not want to do this, on the one hand, we must do so.

examples.chinese: 抽烟一方面对自己有害，一方面对身边的人也有害。
examples.pinyin: chōuyān yī fāngmiàn dùi zìjǐ yǒuhài ，yī fāngmiàn dùi shēnbiān de rén yě yǒuhài 。
examples.english: Smoking is not only harmful to yourself, but also harmful to those around you.

examples.chinese: 用智能手机一方面很方便，另一方面也很容易浪费时间。
examples.pinyin: yòng zhìnéng shǒujī yī fāngmiàn hěn fāngbiàn ，lìng yī fāngmiàn yě hěn róngyì làngfèi shíjiān 。
examples.english: Using a smartphone is convenient on the one hand, and it is also easy to waste time on the other.

title: Many types of 'not only... but also...'
structure: Subj. + 不仅 / 不但 / 不只 + ⋯⋯，而且 / 还 / 也 + ⋯⋯
explanation: Many types of 'not only... but also...'. Used for adding more explanation, giving alternatives, differentiating.

examples.chinese: 这篇文章不仅结构清楚，而且思想先进。
examples.pinyin: zhè piān wénzhāng bùjǐn jiégōu qīngchǔ，érqiě sīxiǎng xiānjìn 。
examples.english: This article not only has a clear structure, but also advanced thinking.

examples.chinese: 他不仅喜欢吃中国菜，而且也会做几个中国菜！
examples.pinyin: tā bùjǐn xǐhuān chī zhōngguó cài，érqiě yě hùi zuò jī gè zhōngguó cài！
examples.english: Not only does he like to eat Chinese food, but he also cooks a few Chinese dishes!

examples.chinese: 这个外国人不只会唱民歌，还会说方言，真是了不起！
examples.pinyin: zhè gè wàiguórén bùzhǐ hùi chàng míngē，huán hùi shuō fāngyán，zhēn shì lebùqǐ！
examples.english: This foreigner not only sings folk songs, but also speaks in dialect, which is really amazing!

examples.chinese: 他不但聪明还很善良。
examples.pinyin: tā bùdàn cōngmíng huán hěn shànliáng 。
examples.english: He is not only smart but also kind.

title: Comparing 'benlai' and 'yuanlai'
structure: Subj. + 本来 + 就 + 很 / 不 + Adj.  /  Subj. + 本来 + 就 + 会 / 要 / 得 / 应该 + Verb
explanation: Comparing 'benlai' and 'yuanlai'. Used for explaining, justifying.

examples.chinese: 生活本来就很不容易。
examples.pinyin: shēnghuóběnlái jìu hěn bù róngyì 。
examples.english: Life is not easy.

examples.chinese: 搬家本来就很麻烦。
examples.pinyin: bānjiā běnláijìu hěn máfán 。
examples.english: Moving is already troublesome.

examples.chinese: 照顾孩子本来就是父母的责任。
examples.pinyin: zhàogù háizǐběnlái jìu shì fùmǔ de zérèn 。
examples.english: Taking care of children is always the responsibility of parents.

examples.chinese: 老师本来就应该好好备课。
examples.pinyin: lǎoshīběnláijìu yìnggāi hǎohǎo bèikè 。
examples.english: The teacher should have prepared the lesson.

examples.chinese: 美国人本来就会说流利的英文。
examples.pinyin: měiguó rén běnláijìu hùi shuō líulì de yīngwén 。
examples.english: Americans are fluent in English.

title: Comparing 'gang' and 'gangcai'
explanation: Comparing 'gang' and 'gangcai'. Used for describing actions, expressing time and date.

examples.chinese: 他刚到。
examples.pinyin: tā gāng dào 。
examples.english: He just arrived.

examples.chinese: 我们昨天刚到。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen zuótiān gāng dào 。
examples.english: We just arrived yesterday.

examples.chinese: 真不巧，老板刚走。
examples.pinyin: zhēn bùqiǎo ，lǎobǎn gāng zǒu 。
examples.english: What a coincidence, the boss just left.

examples.chinese: 我刚到上海的时候，谁都不认识。
examples.pinyin: wǒ gāng dào shànghǎi de shíhòu ，shúi dū bù rènshì 。
examples.english: When I first arrived in Shanghai, no one knew.

examples.chinese: 他的感冒刚刚好。
examples.pinyin: tā de gǎnmào gānggāng hǎo 。
examples.english: His cold is just right.

title: Comparing 'guanyu' and 'duiyu'
explanation: Comparing 'guanyu' and 'duiyu'. Used for adding more explanation, connecting ideas.

examples.chinese: 对于那个人我并不了解。
examples.pinyin: dùiyú nà gè rén wǒ bìng bù lejiě 。
examples.english: I don't understand that person.

examples.chinese: 对于我们的工作表现，老板很满意。
examples.pinyin: dùiyú wǒmen de gōngzuò biǎoxiàn，lǎobǎn hěn mǎnyì 。
examples.english: The boss is very satisfied with our work performance.

examples.chinese: 对于这件事情他没什么看法。
examples.pinyin: dùiyú zhè jiàn shìqíng tā méishíyāo kànfǎ 。
examples.english: He has no idea about this matter.

examples.chinese: 他昨天发表了一个关于中国经济的演讲。
examples.pinyin: tā zuótiān fābiǎo le yīgè guānyú zhōngguó jīngjì de yǎnjiǎng 。
examples.english: He gave a speech on China's economy yesterday.

examples.chinese: 我需要写一篇关于中美文化差异的文章。
examples.pinyin: wǒ xūyào xiě yī piān guānyú zhōngměi wénhuà chàyì de wénzhāng 。
examples.english: I need to write an article about the cultural differences between China and the United States.

title: Comparing 'li' and 'cong'
structure: 从 + Time / Event + 开始 / 起
explanation: Comparing 'li' and 'cong'. Used for describing places, expressing location, expressing distance, giving directions.

examples.chinese: 从下个月起，公司会越来越忙。
examples.pinyin: cóng xià gè yuè qǐ ，gōngsī hùi yuèláiyuè máng 。
examples.english: From next month, the company will become increasingly busy.

examples.chinese: 从我上小学开始，就特别喜欢画画。
examples.pinyin: cóng wǒ shàng xiǎoxué kāishǐ，jìu tèbié xǐhuān huàhuà 。
examples.english: Since I was in elementary school, I have always liked painting.

examples.chinese: 从那以后，我们就没有联系了。
examples.pinyin: cóng nà yǐhòu ，wǒmen jìu méiyǒu liánxì le 。
examples.english: Since then, we have no contact.

examples.chinese: 从今以后，我不用再加班了。
examples.pinyin: cóng jīn yǐhòu ，wǒ bùyòng zài jiābān le 。
examples.english: From now on, I don't have to work overtime anymore.

examples.chinese: 你是不是从我包里拿了一百块钱？
examples.pinyin: nǐ shì bù shì cóng wǒ bāo lǐ ná le yībǎikuàiqián ？
examples.english: Did you take a hundred dollars from my bag?

title: Comparing 'fan'er' and “xiangfan'
explanation: Comparing 'fan'er' and “xiangfan'. Used for expressing attitude.

examples.chinese: 这样做帮不了他，相反，还会害了他。
examples.pinyin: zhèyáng zuò bāng bùle tā ，xiāngfǎn，huán hùi hài le tā 。
examples.english: This will not help him, on the contrary, it will harm him.

examples.chinese: 这样做不但帮不了他，反而会害了他。
examples.pinyin: zhèyáng zuò bùdàn bāng bùle tā，fǎnér hùi hài le tā 。
examples.english: This will not only help him, but will harm him.

examples.chinese: 好好工作就会升职，相反，不好好工作是不会升职的。
examples.pinyin: hǎohǎo gōngzuò jìu hùi shēngzhí，xiāngfǎn，bù hǎohǎo gōngzuò shì bù hùi shēngzhí de 。
examples.english: If you work well, you will be promoted. On the contrary, you will not be promoted if you do not work well.

examples.chinese: 老板没有生气，反而表扬了我。
examples.pinyin: lǎobǎn méiyǒu shēngqì，fǎnér biǎoyáng le wǒ 。
examples.english: The boss was not angry, but praised me instead.

examples.chinese: 老板没有生气，相反，他还表扬了我。
examples.pinyin: lǎobǎn méiyǒu shēngqì，xiāngfǎn，tā huán biǎoyáng le wǒ 。
examples.english: The boss was not angry. On the contrary, he praised me.

title: Comparing 'kending' 'queding' and “yiding'
structure: 肯定 + Noun / Noun Phrase  /  Subj. + (敢)肯定 + Sentences
explanation: Comparing 'kending' 'queding' and “yiding'. Used for describing actions, describing things, expressing attitude, expressing determination.

examples.chinese: 老板肯定了我们团队的工作。
examples.pinyin: lǎobǎn kěndìng le wǒmen tuándùi de gōngzuò 。
examples.english: The boss affirmed the work of our team.

examples.chinese: 如果想让别人肯定你，你就要好好做。
examples.pinyin: rúguǒ xiǎng ràng biérén kěndìng nǐ，nǐ jìu yào hǎohǎo zuò 。
examples.english: If you want others to affirm you, you must do it well.

examples.chinese: 我敢肯定这就是他的声音。
examples.pinyin: wǒ gǎn kěndìng zhè jìu shì tā de shēngyīn 。
examples.english: I'm sure this is his voice.

examples.chinese: 我们还没有确定什么时候开始。
examples.pinyin: wǒmen huán méiyǒu quèdìng shíyāo shíhòu kāishǐ 。
examples.english: We have not determined when to start.

examples.chinese: 已经确定了三个人，还差一个。
examples.pinyin: yǐjīng quèdìngle sān gè rén，huán chà yī gè 。
examples.english: Three people have been identified, and one is still missing.

title: Comparing 'yihou' and 'de shihou'
explanation: Comparing 'yihou' and 'de shihou'. Used for indicating conditions, sequencing events in time, expressing time and date.

examples.chinese: 下飞机以后给我打电话。
examples.pinyin: xià fēijī yǐhòu gěi wǒ dǎdiànhuà 。
examples.english: Call me after getting off the plane.

examples.chinese: 来中国以后我才发现中国菜那么好吃。
examples.pinyin: lái zhōngguó yǐhòu wǒ cái fāxiàn zhōngguó cài nàyāo hǎochī 。
examples.english: I only found Chinese food so delicious after coming to China.

examples.chinese: 毕业以后我打算去上海工作。
examples.pinyin: bìyè yǐhòu wǒ dǎsuàn qù shànghǎi gōngzuò 。
examples.english: After graduation, I plan to work in Shanghai.

examples.chinese: 结婚以后你想继续工作吗？
examples.pinyin: jiéhūn yǐhòu nǐ xiǎng jìxù gōngzuò ma ？
examples.english: Do you want to continue working after marriage?

examples.chinese: 吃饭的时候看电视容易长胖。
examples.pinyin: chīfàn deshíhòu kàn diànshì róngyì cháng pàng 。
examples.english: Watching TV while eating is easy to gain weight.
